nacke/fulltest.code:
"""NackeScript FULL TEST v2 - Comprehensive IDIS diagnostics.
Maps every button/dropdown/link. Tests ALL countries. Opens Amend form.
NO amendments, NO production. Pure read-only diagnostics.

Changes vs v1:
- Tests EVERY country individually (not just first non-D)
- Maps Amend form buttons (Save/Back identification)
- Tests Reset Filter button
- Reports country code mapping
"""
import asyncio
import json
import os
import sys
from datetime import date
from pathlib import Path
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright
from dotenv import load_dotenv

INSTALL_DIR = Path("C:/NackeScript")
load_dotenv(INSTALL_DIR / ".env")

IDIS_URL = "https://idis.retail-sc.com/was/idis/index.jsp"
USERNAME = os.getenv("IDIS_USERNAME", "")
PASSWORD = os.getenv("IDIS_PASSWORD", "")
LOG_DIR = INSTALL_DIR / "logs"
LOG_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

# Known mapping from fulltest v1 (2026-03-09)
COMPANY_VALUE_TO_COUNTRY = {
    "2": "D", "4": "A", "5": "CH", "6": "B", "7": "F",
    "9": "E", "11": "NL", "25": "SK", "30": "OL", "32": "TR",
}

results = {"pages": {}, "errors": [], "country_tests": {}, "amend_form": None}


async def map_page_elements(page, page_name: str) -> dict:
    """Maps ALL interactive elements on the current page."""
    data = {
        "url": page.url,
        "title": await page.title(),
        "buttons": [],
        "dropdowns": [],
        "links": [],
        "inputs": [],
    }

    for sel in ['input[type="submit"]', 'input[type="button"]', "button"]:
        elements = await page.locator(sel).all()
        for el in elements:
            try:
                is_vis = await el.is_visible(timeout=500)
                name = await el.get_attribute("name") or ""
                value = await el.get_attribute("value") or ""
                text = ""
                tag = await el.evaluate("el => el.tagName")
                if tag.lower() == "button":
                    text = (await el.inner_text()).strip()
                btn_type = await el.get_attribute("type") or ""
                data["buttons"].append({
                    "selector": sel, "name": name, "value": value,
                    "text": text, "type": btn_type, "visible": is_vis,
                })
            except Exception:
                pass

    selects = await page.locator("select").all()
    for sel_el in selects:
        try:
            name = await sel_el.get_attribute("name") or ""
            is_vis = await sel_el.is_visible(timeout=500)
            options = []
            opt_els = await sel_el.locator("option").all()
            for opt in opt_els:
                val = await opt.get_attribute("value") or ""
                txt = (await opt.inner_text()).strip()
                options.append({"value": val, "text": txt})
            data["dropdowns"].append({
                "name": name, "visible": is_vis,
                "option_count": len(options), "options": options,
            })
        except Exception:
            pass

    link_els = await page.locator("a").all()
    for link in link_els:
        try:
            text = (await link.inner_text()).strip()
            href = await link.get_attribute("href") or ""
            onclick = await link.get_attribute("onclick") or ""
            is_vis = await link.is_visible(timeout=500)
            if text or onclick:
                data["links"].append({
                    "text": text[:80], "href": href[:120],
                    "onclick": onclick[:120], "visible": is_vis,
                })
        except Exception:
            pass

    input_els = await page.locator('input[type="text"], input[type="password"]').all()
    for inp in input_els:
        try:
            name = await inp.get_attribute("name") or ""
            is_vis = await inp.is_visible(timeout=500)
            val = await inp.get_attribute("value") or ""
            data["inputs"].append({"name": name, "value": val, "visible": is_vis})
        except Exception:
            pass

    ss_path = LOG_DIR / f"test_{page_name}.png"
    await page.screenshot(path=str(ss_path), full_page=True)
    data["screenshot"] = str(ss_path)
    return data


async def main():
    today = date.today().strftime("%d.%m.%Y")
    print(f"=== NACKE FULL TEST v2 === Datum: {today}")
    print(f"URL: {IDIS_URL}")
    print(f"User: {USERNAME}")
    print()

    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        page = await context.new_page()
        page.set_default_timeout(30000)

        # ============================================================
        # STEP 1: LOGIN
        # ============================================================
        print("=== STEP 1: LOGIN ===")
        await page.goto(IDIS_URL, wait_until="networkidle")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        results["pages"]["login"] = await map_page_elements(page, "01_login")
        print(f"  URL nach goto: {page.url}")

        # Login fields
        try:
            await page.fill('input[name="j_username"]', USERNAME)
            await page.fill('input[name="j_password"]', PASSWORD)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  Login fill FEHLER: {e}")
            results["errors"].append(f"Login fill: {e}")

        # Submit via input[name="action"] (verified selector)
        submit_ok = False
        for sel in ['input[name="action"]', 'button[type="submit"]', 'input[type="submit"]']:
            try:
                el = page.locator(sel).first
                if await el.is_visible(timeout=2000):
                    await el.click()
                    submit_ok = True
                    print(f"  Login submit via: {sel}")
                    break
            except Exception:
                continue

        if not submit_ok:
            await page.press('input[name="j_password"]', "Enter")
            print("  Login submit via Enter key")

        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
        print(f"  Nach Login: {page.url}")
        print(f"  Titel: {await page.title()}")

        if "login" in page.url.lower() or "logon" in page.url.lower():
            print("  LOGIN FEHLGESCHLAGEN!")
            results["errors"].append("Login failed - still on login page")
            save_results()
            await browser.close()
            return
        print("  LOGIN OK!")

        # ============================================================
        # STEP 2: Navigate to Process AROS Orders
        # ============================================================
        print("\n=== STEP 2: MAIN MENU -> Process AROS ===")
        results["pages"]["main_menu"] = await map_page_elements(page, "02_main_menu")

        # Click Process AROS Orders
        clicked = False
        for btn in results["pages"]["main_menu"]["buttons"]:
            if "_idJsp53" in btn.get("name", "") or "AROS" in btn.get("value", "").upper():
                await page.click(f'[name="{btn["name"]}"]')
                clicked = True
                print(f"  Clicked: {btn['name']} ('{btn['value']}')")
                break
        if not clicked:
            try:
                await page.click('input[name="mainForm:_idJsp53"]')
                print("  Clicked fallback: mainForm:_idJsp53")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"  FEHLER: Kein AROS Button! {e}")
                results["errors"].append(f"No AROS button: {e}")
        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

        # ============================================================
        # STEP 3: Process AROS page - Map all elements
        # ============================================================
        print("\n=== STEP 3: PROCESS AROS PAGE ===")
        results["pages"]["process_aros"] = await map_page_elements(page, "03_process_aros")
        print(f"  Titel: {await page.title()}")

        # Show dropdowns
        print("  DROPDOWNS:")
        company_dd = None
        date_dd = None
        for dd in results["pages"]["process_aros"]["dropdowns"]:
            print(f"    {dd['name']}: {dd['option_count']} Optionen")
            if "company" in dd["name"].lower():
                company_dd = dd
                for opt in dd["options"]:
                    code = COMPANY_VALUE_TO_COUNTRY.get(opt["value"], "?")
                    print(f"      value='{opt['value']}' text='{opt['text']}' -> code={code}")
            elif "importDate" in dd["name"]:
                date_dd = dd
                for opt in dd["options"][:5]:
                    print(f"      value='{opt['value']}' text='{opt['text']}'")

        # Show ALL buttons (including hidden)
        print("  ALL BUTTONS (including hidden):")
        for btn in results["pages"]["process_aros"]["buttons"]:
            print(f"    name='{btn['name']}' value='{btn['value']}' vis={btn['visible']}")

        if not company_dd:
            print("  FATAL: Kein Company Dropdown!")
            results["errors"].append("No company dropdown")
            save_results()
            await browser.close()
            return

        # ============================================================
        # STEP 4: Test Reset Filter
        # ============================================================
        print("\n=== STEP 4: Reset Filter Test ===")
        # First click Show Result to see if Reset appears after
        if date_dd:
            date_match = None
            for opt in date_dd["options"]:
                if today in opt["value"] or today in opt["text"]:
                    date_match = opt
                    break
            if date_match:
                await page.select_option(f'select[name="{date_dd["name"]}"]', value=date_match["value"])
                print(f"  Date gesetzt: {date_match['value']}")
            else:
                print(f"  WARNUNG: {today} nicht im Dropdown, nehme ersten Eintrag")
                if date_dd["options"]:
                    date_match = date_dd["options"][0]
                    await page.select_option(f'select[name="{date_dd["name"]}"]', value=date_match["value"])

        # Show Result first, then check for Reset button
        await page.click('input[name="mainForm:_idJsp49"]')
        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

        # Now re-scan for buttons (Reset might appear after Show Result)
        after_show = await map_page_elements(page, "04_after_show_all")
        results["pages"]["after_show_all"] = after_show

        print("  Buttons NACH Show Result:")
        reset_btn_name = None
        for btn in after_show["buttons"]:
            print(f"    name='{btn['name']}' value='{btn['value']}' vis={btn['visible']}")
            val_lower = btn.get("value", "").lower()
            if "reset" in val_lower or "_idJsp48" in btn.get("name", ""):
                reset_btn_name = btn["name"]
                print(f"    ^^ RESET BUTTON GEFUNDEN!")

        if reset_btn_name:
            print(f"  Teste Reset: {reset_btn_name}")
            await page.click(f'[name="{reset_btn_name}"]')
            await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
            results["reset_filter_works"] = True
            print("  Reset OK")
        else:
            results["reset_filter_works"] = False
            print("  KEIN Reset Button gefunden (weder vor noch nach Show Result)")

        # ============================================================
        # STEP 5: Test EVERY country
        # ============================================================
        print("\n=== STEP 5: Test ALLE Laender ===")
        first_country_with_rows = None

        for opt in company_dd["options"]:
            code = COMPANY_VALUE_TO_COUNTRY.get(opt["value"])
            if not code:
                continue  # Skip "All Companies" etc.

            print(f"\n  --- {code} ({opt['text']}, value={opt['value']}) ---")

            # Set date + company filter
            if date_match:
                await page.select_option(f'select[name="{date_dd["name"]}"]', value=date_match["value"])
            await page.select_option(f'select[name="{company_dd["name"]}"]', value=opt["value"])

            # Show Result
            await page.click('input[name="mainForm:_idJsp49"]')
            await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

            # Count rows
            rows = await page.locator("tr.row_odd, tr.row_even").all()
            row_count = len(rows)
            print(f"    Rows: {row_count}")

            # Read first 2 rows
            sample_rows = []
            for i, row in enumerate(rows[:2]):
                cells = await row.locator("td").all()
                cell_texts = []
                for c in cells:
                    t = (await c.inner_text()).strip()
                    cell_texts.append(t[:40])
                sample_rows.append(cell_texts)
                if i == 0:
                    print(f"    Row 0: {cell_texts[:6]}")

            results["country_tests"][code] = {
                "value": opt["value"],
                "text": opt["text"],
                "row_count": row_count,
                "sample_rows": sample_rows,
            }

            if row_count > 0 and first_country_with_rows is None and code != "D":
                first_country_with_rows = {"code": code, "opt": opt}

        print(f"\n  Erstes Land mit Rows (nicht D): {first_country_with_rows}")

        # ============================================================
        # STEP 6: Open Amend form (first country with rows)
        # ============================================================
        print("\n=== STEP 6: Amend Form Mapping ===")
        if first_country_with_rows:
            fcwr = first_country_with_rows
            print(f"  Oeffne Amend fuer Land {fcwr['code']}...")

            # Filter again for this country
            if date_match:
                await page.select_option(f'select[name="{date_dd["name"]}"]', value=date_match["value"])
            await page.select_option(f'select[name="{company_dd["name"]}"]', value=fcwr["opt"]["value"])
            await page.click('input[name="mainForm:_idJsp49"]')
            await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

            rows = await page.locator("tr.row_odd, tr.row_even").all()
            if rows:
                # Find Amend button in first row
                first_row = rows[0]
                row_btns = await first_row.locator('input[type="submit"], input[type="button"]').all()
                row_links = await first_row.locator("a").all()

                print(f"  Buttons in Row 0: {len(row_btns)}")
                for rb in row_btns:
                    n = await rb.get_attribute("name") or ""
                    v = await rb.get_attribute("value") or ""
                    print(f"    BTN: name='{n}' value='{v}'")

                print(f"  Links in Row 0: {len(row_links)}")
                for rl in row_links:
                    t = (await rl.inner_text()).strip()
                    h = await rl.get_attribute("href") or ""
                    o = await rl.get_attribute("onclick") or ""
                    print(f"    LINK: text='{t}' href='{h[:60]}' onclick='{o[:60]}'")

                # Click first button or link that looks like Amend
                amend_clicked = False
                for rb in row_btns:
                    n = await rb.get_attribute("name") or ""
                    v = await rb.get_attribute("value") or ""
                    if "amend" in v.lower() or "_idJsp216" in n or "_idJsp" in n:
                        print(f"  Clicking Amend button: {n}")
                        await rb.click()
                        amend_clicked = True
                        break

                if not amend_clicked:
                    for rl in row_links:
                        t = (await rl.inner_text()).strip()
                        if "amend" in t.lower():
                            print(f"  Clicking Amend link: '{t}'")
                            await rl.click()
                            amend_clicked = True
                            break

                if not amend_clicked and row_btns:
                    print(f"  Clicking first button as fallback")
                    await row_btns[0].click()
                    amend_clicked = True

                if amend_clicked:
                    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

                    amend_data = await map_page_elements(page, "06_amend_form")
                    results["pages"]["amend_form"] = amend_data
                    results["amend_form"] = amend_data
                    print(f"  Amend Form Titel: {amend_data['title']}")
                    print(f"  Amend Form URL: {amend_data['url']}")

                    # CRITICAL: Map Save/Back buttons
                    print("\n  === AMEND FORM BUTTONS (KRITISCH!) ===")
                    for btn in amend_data["buttons"]:
                        vis = "VISIBLE" if btn["visible"] else "hidden"
                        print(f"    [{vis}] name='{btn['name']}' value='{btn['value']}' type='{btn['type']}'")

                    # Map Qty fields
                    print("\n  === QTY FELDER ===")
                    qty_count = 0
                    for inp in amend_data["inputs"]:
                        if inp["visible"] and "_idJsp" in inp.get("name", ""):
                            print(f"    name='{inp['name']}' value='{inp['value']}'")
                            qty_count += 1
                    print(f"  Total Qty Felder: {qty_count}")

                    # Identify Save vs Back
                    print("\n  === SAVE vs BACK Identifikation ===")
                    for btn in amend_data["buttons"]:
                        if btn["visible"] and "_idJsp" in btn.get("name", ""):
                            val = btn["value"].lower()
                            if any(w in val for w in ["save", "confirm", "speichern", "ok"]):
                                print(f"    SAVE: name='{btn['name']}' value='{btn['value']}'")
                            elif any(w in val for w in ["back", "cancel", "zurueck", "abbrechen"]):
                                print(f"    BACK: name='{btn['name']}' value='{btn['value']}'")
                            else:
                                print(f"    ???:  name='{btn['name']}' value='{btn['value']}'")

                    # Go back WITHOUT saving
                    back_clicked = False
                    for btn in amend_data["buttons"]:
                        if btn["visible"]:
                            val = btn.get("value", "").lower()
                            if any(w in val for w in ["back", "zurueck", "cancel", "abbrechen"]):
                                print(f"\n  Klicke Back: {btn['name']}")
                                await page.click(f'[name="{btn["name"]}"]')
                                back_clicked = True
                                break
                    if not back_clicked:
                        print("  WARNUNG: Kein Back-Button! Navigiere zurueck...")
                        await page.go_back()

                    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
                    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
                    print(f"  Nach Back: {page.url}")
                else:
                    print("  FEHLER: Konnte Amend nicht oeffnen!")
            else:
                print("  Keine Rows nach erneutem Filtern!")
        else:
            print("  KEIN Land mit Rows gefunden - kann Amend nicht testen!")
            print("  Moegliche Ursachen: Kein Import fuer heute, oder alle Orders sind D")

        # ============================================================
        # SUMMARY
        # ============================================================
        print("\n" + "=" * 60)
        print("ZUSAMMENFASSUNG")
        print("=" * 60)

        print("\nLaender-Ergebnisse:")
        total_rows = 0
        for code, data in results["country_tests"].items():
            rc = data["row_count"]
            total_rows += rc
            marker = " <-- D (skip)" if code == "D" else ""
            print(f"  {code:3s} (value={data['value']:3s}): {rc:4d} Rows{marker}")
        print(f"  TOTAL: {total_rows} Rows")

        if results.get("amend_form"):
            af = results["amend_form"]
            vis_btns = [b for b in af["buttons"] if b["visible"]]
            print(f"\nAmend Form: {len(vis_btns)} visible Buttons")
            for b in vis_btns:
                print(f"  {b['name']}: '{b['value']}'")

        print(f"\nReset Filter: {'JA' if results.get('reset_filter_works') else 'NEIN'}")

        if results["errors"]:
            print(f"\nFEHLER: {results['errors']}")

        await browser.close()

    save_results()


def save_results():
    result_path = LOG_DIR / "fulltest_v2_result.json"
    with open(result_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(results, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False, default=str)
    print(f"\nJSON: {result_path}")


asyncio.run(main())

nacke/idis-amend.code:
"""
idis_amend.py - Overconfirmation Amendments in IDIS anwenden.

Einzeln testbar: python idis_amend.py
Braucht: idis_connect.py, idis_selectors.py, idis_export.py

REGELN:
  - NIEMALS wait_for_load_state("networkidle") - haengt bei CDP
  - NUR wait_for_timeout() verwenden
  - Overconfirmation = ceil(ordered/bundle)*bundle pro Destination
  - Berechnung per JavaScript DIREKT im Amend-Formular
  - Bundle Size IMMER aus Col K (RPR Kartonage), NIEMALS Col J
  - Tabelle direkt iterieren, NICHT per Order-ID aus CSV matchen
  - Save = mainForm:_idJsp159, Back = mainForm:_idJsp155 (NICHT vertauschen!)
"""

import asyncio
import logging

from idis_connect import IdisConnection
from idis_selectors import (
    SEL_ROW_AMEND_BTN_TPL,
    SEL_AMEND_SAVE, SEL_AMEND_CANCEL,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# JS Code fuer Overconfirmation-Berechnung
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Wird direkt im Browser ausgefuehrt.
# Liest ordered aus Spalte 6, committed Input aus Spalte 8 (_idJsp140).
# Berechnung: ceil(ordered / bundle_size) * bundle_size
AMEND_JS_TEMPLATE = """() => {{
    const eff = {bundle_size};
    const changes = [];
    let missingWeights = 0;
    const dataRows = document.querySelectorAll('tr.row_odd, tr.row_even');
    for (let ri = 0; ri < dataRows.length; ri++) {{
        const cells = dataRows[ri].querySelectorAll('td');
        const orderedText = (cells[6] || {{}}).innerText?.trim() || '0';
        const ordered = parseInt(orderedText) || 0;
        const committedInput = (cells[8] || {{}}).querySelector('input[type="text"]');
        if (!committedInput || !committedInput.name.includes('_idJsp140')) continue;
        const committed = parseInt(committedInput.value) || 0;
        if (ordered <= 0) continue;
        const weightInput = (cells[4] || {{}}).querySelector('input[type="text"]');
        const weight = weightInput ? weightInput.value.trim() : '';
        if (!weight) missingWeights++;
        const neu = Math.ceil(ordered / eff) * eff;
        if (neu !== committed) {{
            committedInput.value = neu.toString();
            committedInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {{bubbles: true}}));
        }}
        changes.push({{ordered, old: committed, neu, delta: neu - committed}});
    }}
    return {{changes, total: changes.length, missingWeights}};
}}"""


async def amend_single_order(
    conn: IdisConnection,
    row_idx: int,
    order_id: str,
    bundle_size: int,
    stop_before_save: bool = False,
) -> bool:
    """Wendet Overconfirmation auf eine einzelne Order an.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (Result-Tabelle sichtbar)
        row_idx: Zeilen-Index in der Result-Tabelle
        order_id: Order Number (fuer Logging)
        bundle_size: Bundle-Groesse aus Col K (RPR Kartonage)
        stop_before_save: True = Felder ausfuellen, NICHT speichern

    Returns:
        True bei Erfolg
    """
    page = conn.page

    try:
        # Amend-Button fuer diese Zeile klicken
        amend_name = f"mainForm:_idJsp121:{row_idx}:_idJsp216"
        amend_sel = f'input[name="{amend_name}"]'
        logger.info("  Amend: %s (row %d, bundle=%d)", order_id, row_idx, bundle_size)

        await page.click(amend_sel)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)

        await conn.screenshot(f"amend_form_{order_id}")

        # JS: ceil(ordered/bundle)*bundle pro Destination
        js_code = AMEND_JS_TEMPLATE.format(bundle_size=int(bundle_size))
        js_result = await page.evaluate(js_code)

        changes = js_result.get("changes", [])
        missing_w = js_result.get("missingWeights", 0)
        changed = sum(1 for c in changes if c["delta"] != 0)
        logger.info("    %d Dest, %d geaendert, %d ohne Gewicht", len(changes), changed, missing_w)

        if missing_w > 0 and missing_w == len(changes):
            logger.warning("  ALLE Gewichte fehlen fuer %s — skip Amend", order_id)
            from idis_save_back import back_to_table
            await back_to_table(conn)
            return "missing_weight"

        if stop_before_save:
            logger.info("  stop_before_save=True - NICHT gespeichert fuer %s", order_id)
            # FIX: Zurueck zur Tabelle, sonst bleibt Browser im Amend-Formular
            from idis_save_back import back_to_table
            await back_to_table(conn)
            return True

        # Save klicken (mainForm:_idJsp159)
        from idis_save_back import save_amend
        await save_amend(conn, order_id)

        logger.info("  Amend OK: %s", order_id)
        return True

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("  Amend FEHLER %s: %s", order_id, e)
        await conn.screenshot(f"amend_error_{order_id}")
        return False


async def apply_amendments(
    conn: IdisConnection,
    amendments: list[dict],
    stop_before_save: bool = False,
) -> int:
    """Wendet Overconfirmation-Amendments auf alle Orders an.

    Iteriert die Result-Tabelle direkt (NICHT per Order-ID aus CSV).

    Args:
        amendments: Liste von Dicts mit aros_key und bundle_size
        stop_before_save: True = nur ausfuellen, nicht speichern

    Returns:
        Anzahl erfolgreich verarbeiteter Amendments
    """
    page = conn.page
    success_count = 0

    # Table Data extrahieren
    from idis_export import get_result_table_data
    logger.info("Extracting result table...")
    table_orders = await get_result_table_data(conn)

    if not table_orders:
        logger.error("Result table leer - keine Amendments moeglich")
        await conn.screenshot("amend_empty_table")
        return 0

    # Bundle-Map aufbauen: aros_key -> bundle_size
    bundle_map = {}
    for amend in amendments:
        ak = amend.get("aros_key", "")
        bs = amend.get("bundle_size", 0)
        if ak and bs > 0:
            bundle_map[ak] = bs

    logger.info(
        "Bundle-Map: %d Keys, Tabelle: %d Zeilen, Amendments: %d",
        len(bundle_map), len(table_orders), len(amendments),
    )

    # Packaging-Tracking: welche AROS-Keys wurden schon gefixt
    from idis_packaging import fix_single_packaging
    packaging_fixed = set()
    packaging_results = []
    missing_weight_orders = []

    for order in table_orders:
        order_id = order.get("order_number", "")
        row_idx = order.get("row_index")
        if not order_id or row_idx is None:
            continue

        # AROS-Key: erste 4 Teile der Order-Nummer
        parts = order_id.split("-")
        aros_key = "-".join(parts[:4]) if len(parts) >= 4 else order_id

        bundle_size = bundle_map.get(aros_key, 0)
        if bundle_size <= 0:
            continue

        # Packaging-Check: Bundle IDIS vs Master — nur 1x pro AROS-Key
        if aros_key not in packaging_fixed:
            bundle_idis_str = str(order.get("bundle", "0")).strip()
            try:
                bundle_idis = float(bundle_idis_str)
            except (ValueError, TypeError):
                bundle_idis = 0.0

            if bundle_idis != bundle_size and bundle_idis > 0:
                logger.warning(
                    "  Bundle-Mismatch %s: IDIS=%.0f, Master=%.0f",
                    order_id, bundle_idis, bundle_size,
                )
                pkg_ok = await fix_single_packaging(
                    conn, row_idx, order_id,
                    bundle_size, bundle_idis,
                    dry_run=stop_before_save,
                )
                packaging_results.append({
                    "order_id": order_id,
                    "aros_key": aros_key,
                    "bundle_idis": bundle_idis,
                    "bundle_master": bundle_size,
                    "status": "ok" if pkg_ok else "error",
                })
                packaging_fixed.add(aros_key)

        # Amend: Overconfirmation anwenden
        ok = await amend_single_order(
            conn, row_idx, order_id, bundle_size, stop_before_save
        )

        if ok == "missing_weight":
            missing_weight_orders.append(order_id)
        elif ok:
            success_count += 1

        if ok != "missing_weight" and not stop_before_save:
            from idis_save_back import back_to_table
            await back_to_table(conn)

    if packaging_results:
        pkg_ok = sum(1 for r in packaging_results if r["status"] == "ok")
        logger.info(
            "Packaging: %d/%d AROS-Keys korrigiert%s",
            pkg_ok, len(packaging_results),
            " [DRY-RUN]" if stop_before_save else "",
        )
        for r in packaging_results:
            logger.info(
                "  %s: IDIS=%.0f -> Master=%.0f (%s)",
                r["order_id"], r["bundle_idis"], r["bundle_master"], r["status"],
            )
        # Packaging-Mismatches fuer Report speichern
        import json
        from pathlib import Path
        pkg_path = Path("logs/packaging_mismatches.json")
        pkg_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        existing = []
        if pkg_path.exists():
            try:
                existing = json.loads(pkg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            except Exception:
                existing = []
        existing.extend(packaging_results)
        pkg_path.write_text(json.dumps(existing, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

    if missing_weight_orders:
        import json
        from pathlib import Path
        logger.warning(
            "%d Orders ohne Gewichte uebersprungen: %s",
            len(missing_weight_orders),
            ", ".join(missing_weight_orders),
        )
        mw_path = Path("logs/missing_weights.json")
        mw_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        existing_mw = []
        if mw_path.exists():
            try:
                existing_mw = json.loads(mw_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            except Exception:
                existing_mw = []
        existing_mw.extend(missing_weight_orders)
        mw_path.write_text(json.dumps(existing_mw, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

    action = "ausgefuellt (NICHT gespeichert)" if stop_before_save else "erfolgreich"
    logger.info("Amendments: %d/%d %s", success_count, len(amendments), action)
    return success_count


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standalone Test
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
async def _test():
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
    print("idis_amend.py - Module-Check OK")
    print("  Amend JS Template geladen")
    print(f"  Save Selector: {SEL_AMEND_SAVE}")
    print(f"  Back Selector: {SEL_AMEND_CANCEL}")
    print("  Fuer echten Test: VPN + IDIS Login noetig")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(_test())

nacke/idis-connect.code:
"""
idis_connect.py - Browser starten/verbinden via CDP Port 9222.

Einzeln testbar: python idis_connect.py
Startet Browser oder verbindet zu bestehendem, gibt Page-Objekt zurueck.

REGELN:
  - NIEMALS wait_for_load_state("networkidle") - haengt bei CDP
  - NUR wait_for_timeout() verwenden
  - NIEMALS chromium.launch() - blockiert Worker
  - NIEMALS slow_mo
  - NIEMALS bestehende Contexts/Pages schliessen
  - Browser bleibt offen (detached) nach close()
"""

import asyncio
import json
import logging
import os
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path

from dotenv import load_dotenv

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
load_dotenv()

DEFAULT_CDP_PORT = 9222


class IdisConnection:
    """Verwaltet die CDP-Verbindung zum Chrome-Browser."""

    _startup_lock: asyncio.Lock | None = None

    def __init__(self, config_path: str = "config.json", port: int = None):
        with open(config_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            self.cfg = json.load(f)

        idis_cfg = self.cfg.get("idis", {})
        self.url = idis_cfg.get("url", "")
        self.timeout = idis_cfg.get("timeout_ms", 30000)

        self._browser = None
        self._context = None
        self._page = None
        self._pw = None
        self._port = port or idis_cfg.get("cdp_port", DEFAULT_CDP_PORT)
        self._cdp_url = f"http://127.0.0.1:{self._port}"
        self._country_label = None

    @property
    def page(self):
        """Aktuelles Page-Objekt (nach connect() verfuegbar)."""
        return self._page

    @property
    def browser(self):
        return self._browser

    async def connect(self) -> "IdisConnection":
        """Verbindet per CDP mit bestehendem Browser oder startet neuen.

        Returns:
            self (fuer Method-Chaining)
        """
        if self._browser is not None:
            return self

        if IdisConnection._startup_lock is None:
            IdisConnection._startup_lock = asyncio.Lock()

        async with IdisConnection._startup_lock:
            from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

            self._pw = await async_playwright().start()
            chromium_path = self._pw.chromium.executable_path
            chrome_data = str(Path("chrome_data").absolute())

            # Versuche bestehende CDP-Session
            try:
                self._browser = await self._pw.chromium.connect_over_cdp(
                    self._cdp_url, timeout=3000
                )
                logger.info("CDP: bestehende Browser-Session wiederverwendet")
            except Exception:
                # Browser als eigener Prozess starten (detached)
                logger.info("CDP: Starte neuen Browser auf Port %d...", self._port)
                subprocess.Popen(
                    [
                        chromium_path,
                        f"--remote-debugging-port={self._port}",
                        f"--user-data-dir={chrome_data}_{self._port}",
                        "--no-first-run",
                        "--no-default-browser-check",
                    ],
                    creationflags=(
                        subprocess.DETACHED_PROCESS
                        | subprocess.CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP
                    ),
                )
                # Retry-Loop: Browser braucht manchmal laenger zum Starten
                for attempt in range(5):
                    await asyncio.sleep(2)
                    try:
                        self._browser = await self._pw.chromium.connect_over_cdp(self._cdp_url)
                        logger.info("CDP: Browser gestartet und verbunden (Port %d, Versuch %d)", self._port, attempt + 1)
                        break
                    except Exception:
                        if attempt == 4:
                            raise
                        logger.debug("CDP: Browser noch nicht bereit (Versuch %d/5)", attempt + 1)

        # Eigener Context pro Instanz (Parallelverarbeitung)
        self._context = await self._browser.new_context(
            viewport={"width": 1400, "height": 900},
            ignore_https_errors=True,
        )
        self._page = await self._context.new_page()
        self._page.set_default_timeout(self.timeout)

        tag = f" [{self._country_label}]" if self._country_label else ""
        logger.info("Browser bereit%s (CDP, Port %d)", tag, self._port)
        return self

    async def close(self):
        """Playwright-Verbindung trennen. Browser bleibt offen."""
        if self._context:
            await self._context.close()
            self._context = None
        self._page = None
        # KEINE browser.close() - Browser bleibt fuer naechsten Run
        self._browser = None
        if self._pw:
            await self._pw.stop()
            self._pw = None
        logger.info("Playwright-Verbindung getrennt (Browser laeuft weiter)")

    async def disconnect(self):
        """Alias fuer close() â€” Rueckwaertskompatibilitaet."""
        await self.close()

    async def screenshot(self, name: str, exports_dir: str = None):
        """Screenshot erstellen."""
        if not self._page:
            return
        try:
            from datetime import datetime
            ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
            out_dir = exports_dir or self.cfg["paths"].get("exports_dir", ".")
            path = Path(out_dir) / f"screenshot_{name}_{ts}.png"
            path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            await self._page.screenshot(path=str(path))
            logger.info("Screenshot: %s", path)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.debug("Screenshot fehlgeschlagen: %s", e)


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standalone Test
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
async def _test():
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
    conn = IdisConnection()
    await conn.connect()
    page = conn.page
    title = await page.title()
    url = page.url
    print(f"Verbunden! Titel='{title}', URL='{url}'")
    await conn.close()
    print("Test OK - Browser laeuft weiter")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(_test())

nacke/idis-export.code:
"""
idis_export.py - IDIS Filter setzen + Show Result + CSV Export.

Einzeln testbar: python idis_export.py
Braucht: idis_connect.py, idis_selectors.py, idis_login.py

REGELN:
  - NIEMALS wait_for_load_state("networkidle") - haengt bei CDP
  - NUR wait_for_timeout() verwenden
  - Bundle Size IMMER aus Col K (RPR Kartonage), NIEMALS Col J
"""

import asyncio
import csv
import logging
from datetime import date, datetime
from pathlib import Path

from idis_connect import IdisConnection
from idis_selectors import (
    SEL_FILTER_IMPORT_DATE, SEL_FILTER_COMPANY,
    SEL_SHOW_RESULT, SEL_EXPORT_SELECTED,
    SEL_ORDER_EXPORT_BTN,
    RESULT_TABLE_COLUMNS, COUNTRY_SEARCH, PICKING_MAP,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


async def show_filtered_results(
    conn: IdisConnection,
    filter_date: date,
    country: str = None,
) -> int:
    """Setzt Filter und zeigt Ergebnisse in der Result-Tabelle.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (auf Process AROS Seite)
        filter_date: Import-Datum zum Filtern
        country: Optional - Laenderkuerzel (A, CH, E, SK, OL, etc.)

    Returns:
        Anzahl der Zeilen in der Result-Tabelle
    """
    page = conn.page
    tag = f"[{conn._country_label}] " if conn._country_label else ""

    # Sicherstellen dass wir auf Process AROS sind
    title = await page.title()
    if "Process AROS" not in title:
        from idis_login import navigate_to_process_aros
        await navigate_to_process_aros(conn)

    # Import Date Filter
    date_str = filter_date.strftime("%d.%m.%Y")
    date_select = page.locator(SEL_FILTER_IMPORT_DATE)
    options = await date_select.locator("option").all()
    date_found = False
    for opt in options:
        val = await opt.get_attribute("value") or ""
        txt = (await opt.inner_text()).strip()
        if date_str in val or date_str in txt:
            await date_select.select_option(value=val)
            logger.info("%sImport Date Filter gesetzt: %s", tag, val)
            date_found = True
            break

    if not date_found:
        logger.warning("%sDatum %s nicht im Filter - verwende 'All Dates'", tag, date_str)

    # Company Filter (optional)
    if country:
        search_name = COUNTRY_SEARCH.get(country.upper(), country)
        company_select = page.locator(SEL_FILTER_COMPANY)
        company_options = await company_select.locator("option").all()
        for opt in company_options:
            val = await opt.get_attribute("value") or ""
            txt = (await opt.inner_text()).strip()
            if search_name.upper() in txt.upper():
                await company_select.select_option(value=val)
                logger.info("%sCompany Filter: %s (val=%s)", tag, txt, val)
                break

    # Show Result
    await page.click(SEL_SHOW_RESULT)
    await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)

    # Zeilen zaehlen
    data_rows = page.locator("tr.row_odd, tr.row_even")
    row_count = await data_rows.count()
    logger.info("%sResult table: %d Zeilen", tag, row_count)

    return row_count


async def get_result_table_data(conn: IdisConnection) -> list[dict]:
    """Extrahiert Order-Daten aus der Result-Tabelle.

    Returns:
        Liste von Dicts mit Keys aus RESULT_TABLE_COLUMNS + 'row_index'
    """
    page = conn.page
    orders = []

    data_rows = page.locator("tr.row_odd, tr.row_even")
    row_count = await data_rows.count()
    logger.info("Result table: %d data rows", row_count)

    for i in range(row_count):
        row = data_rows.nth(i)
        cells = row.locator("td")
        cell_count = await cells.count()

        order = {"row_index": i}
        for col_idx, field_name in RESULT_TABLE_COLUMNS.items():
            if col_idx < cell_count:
                text = (await cells.nth(col_idx).inner_text()).strip()
                order[field_name] = text
            else:
                order[field_name] = ""

        if order.get("order_number"):
            orders.append(order)

    logger.info("Extracted %d orders from result table", len(orders))
    return orders


async def export_orders(
    conn: IdisConnection,
    export_date: date,
    suffix: str = "pre",
) -> tuple[str, list[dict]]:
    """Exportiert Orders fuer das angegebene Datum als CSV.

    Workflow:
    1. Filter: Import Date = export_date
    2. Show Result
    3. Select All (JS, ohne Events)
    4. Export Selected -> CSV Download
    5. Archivieren als IDIS_EXPORT_YYYY-MM-DD_{suffix}.csv

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection
        export_date: Datum
        suffix: "pre" oder "post"

    Returns:
        (csv_path, parsed_rows)
    """
    page = conn.page
    exports_dir = Path(conn.cfg["paths"]["exports_dir"])
    exports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    try:
        logger.info("IDIS Export: Datum=%s, Suffix=%s", export_date, suffix)

        # Filter + Show Result
        row_count = await show_filtered_results(conn, export_date)

        if row_count == 0:
            logger.info("Keine Orders fuer %s - Export uebersprungen", export_date)
            return "", []

        await conn.screenshot(f"show_result_{suffix}")

        # Select All per JS (KEINE Events dispatchen!)
        selected_count = await page.evaluate("""() => {
            const boxes = document.querySelectorAll(
                'tr.row_odd input[type="checkbox"], '
                + 'tr.row_even input[type="checkbox"]'
            );
            let count = 0;
            boxes.forEach(cb => { cb.checked = true; count++; });
            return count;
        }""")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        logger.info("Select All: %d Checkboxen aktiviert (JS)", selected_count)

        # Export Selected -> Download
        download = None

        # Versuch A: Direkter Download
        logger.info("Export Selected: Starte Download-Listener...")
        try:
            async with page.expect_download(timeout=12000) as dl_info:
                await page.click(SEL_EXPORT_SELECTED)
            download = await dl_info.value
            logger.info("Download direkt: %s", download.suggested_filename)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.info("Kein sofortiger Download (%s)", type(e).__name__)

        # Versuch B: orderExport.faces -> Image Button
        if download is None:
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            await conn.screenshot(f"after_export_selected_{suffix}")

            export_btn = page.locator(SEL_ORDER_EXPORT_BTN)
            if await export_btn.is_visible(timeout=5000):
                logger.info("Export Image Button gefunden - klicke...")
                try:
                    async with page.expect_download(timeout=60000) as dl_info:
                        await export_btn.click()
                    download = await dl_info.value
                    logger.info("Download via Image Button: %s", download.suggested_filename)
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.warning('Download-Button fehlgeschlagen: %s', e)

                # Versuch C: CSV direkt im Browser (kein Content-Disposition)
                if download is None:
                    body_text = await page.locator("body").inner_text()
                    lines = body_text.strip().splitlines()
                    if len(lines) > 5 and ";" in body_text:
                        logger.info("CSV im Browser (%d Zeilen) - speichere", len(lines))
                        archive_name = f"IDIS_EXPORT_{export_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}_{suffix}.csv"
                        archive_path = exports_dir / archive_name
                        archive_path.write_text(body_text, encoding="utf-8-sig")
                        rows = parse_csv(str(archive_path))
                        from idis_login import navigate_back_to_main
                        await navigate_back_to_main(conn)
                        return str(archive_path), rows

        if download is None:
            raise RuntimeError("IDIS Export: Kein Download erhalten")

        # Download speichern
        archive_name = f"IDIS_EXPORT_{export_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}_{suffix}.csv"
        archive_path = exports_dir / archive_name
        await download.save_as(str(archive_path))

        if archive_path.stat().st_size == 0:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Download leer: {archive_path}")

        logger.info("Export: %s (%d bytes)", archive_path, archive_path.stat().st_size)

        rows = parse_csv(str(archive_path))
        logger.info("Export enthaelt %d Zeilen", len(rows))

        from idis_login import navigate_back_to_main
        await navigate_back_to_main(conn)

        return str(archive_path), rows

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("IDIS Export fehlgeschlagen: %s", e)
        await conn.screenshot(f"export_error_{suffix}")
        raise


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# CSV Parsing
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

def parse_csv(csv_path: str) -> list[dict]:
    """Parst eine IDIS-Export-CSV (headerless, 19 Felder, ";"-getrennt)."""
    rows = []

    for encoding in ["utf-8-sig", "utf-8", "latin-1"]:
        try:
            with open(csv_path, "r", encoding=encoding) as f:
                first_line = f.readline().strip()
                f.seek(0)

                has_header = any(
                    h in first_line.lower()
                    for h in ["order", "supplier", "import", "date"]
                )

                if has_header:
                    reader = csv.DictReader(f, delimiter=";")
                    for row in reader:
                        normalized = _normalize_row_dict(row)
                        if normalized:
                            rows.append(normalized)
                else:
                    reader = csv.reader(f, delimiter=";")
                    for fields in reader:
                        if not fields or len(fields) < 15:
                            continue
                        normalized = _normalize_row_positional(fields)
                        if normalized:
                            rows.append(normalized)
            break
        except UnicodeDecodeError:
            continue

    logger.info("CSV geparst: %d Zeilen aus %s", len(rows), csv_path)
    return rows


def _normalize_row_positional(fields: list) -> dict | None:
    """Normalisiert CSV-Zeile anhand Feldposition (headerless, 19/20 Felder)."""
    if len(fields) < 15:
        return None

    def safe_str(idx):
        return str(fields[idx]).strip() if idx < len(fields) else ""

    def safe_int(idx):
        try:
            return int(float(safe_str(idx).replace(",", ".")))
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            return 0

    supplier = safe_str(3)
    cls_code = safe_str(4)
    code = safe_str(5)
    serial = safe_str(6)
    aros_key = f"{supplier}-{cls_code}-{code}-{serial}"

    picking_raw = safe_str(11)
    abrufart = PICKING_MAP.get(picking_raw, "PCS")

    order_type = safe_str(18) if len(fields) > 18 else "S"
    picking = "Store" if order_type.upper() == "S" else "Depot"

    row = {
        "order_id": safe_str(1),
        "aros_key": aros_key,
        "aros_number": safe_str(2),
        "supplier": supplier,
        "class": cls_code,
        "code": code,
        "serial": serial,
        "country": safe_str(8).upper(),
        "committed_qty": safe_int(9),
        "ordered_qty": safe_int(10),
        "abrufart": abrufart,
        "picking_method": picking_raw,
        "size": safe_str(14),
        "quantity": safe_int(15),
        "item_number": safe_str(16),
        "selling_price": safe_str(17),
        "picking": picking,
        "order_type": order_type.upper(),
    }

    if len(fields) >= 20:
        row["committed_qty_for_size"] = safe_int(19)

    return row


def _normalize_row_dict(row: dict) -> dict | None:
    """Normalisiert CSV-Zeile mit Headers (Fallback)."""
    if not row:
        return None

    result = {}
    for key in ["Ordernummer", "Order", "OrderNr", "order_id", "Order Number"]:
        if key in row and row[key]:
            result["order_id"] = str(row[key]).strip()
            break

    for key in ["Aros", "AROS", "aros"]:
        if key in row and row[key]:
            result["aros_key"] = str(row[key]).strip()
            break

    for key in ["Land", "Country", "country"]:
        if key in row and row[key]:
            result["country"] = str(row[key]).strip().upper()
            break

    for key in ["Menge", "Quantity", "Qty", "qty_for_size"]:
        if key in row and row[key]:
            try:
                result["quantity"] = int(float(str(row[key]).replace(",", ".")))
            except (ValueError, TypeError) as e:
                logger.warning('Quantity-Parsing fehlgeschlagen: %s', e)
            break

    for key in ["Groesse", "Size", "size"]:
        if key in row and row[key]:
            result["size"] = str(row[key]).strip()
            break

    if "order_id" not in result and "aros_key" not in result:
        return None

    result.setdefault("abrufart", "PCS")
    result.setdefault("picking", "Store")
    return result


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standalone Test
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
async def _test():
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
    conn = IdisConnection()
    await conn.connect()

    from idis_login import login, navigate_to_process_aros
    await login(conn)
    await navigate_to_process_aros(conn)

    count = await show_filtered_results(conn, date.today())
    print(f"Ergebnis: {count} Zeilen")

    if count > 0:
        orders = await get_result_table_data(conn)
        print(f"Extrahiert: {len(orders)} Orders")
        if orders:
            print(f"  Erste Order: {orders[0].get('order_number', '?')}")

    await conn.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    from idis_connect import IdisConnection
    asyncio.run(_test())

"""
idis_login.py - IDIS Login + Navigation zu Process AROS.

Einzeln testbar: python idis_login.py
Braucht: idis_connect.py, idis_selectors.py

REGELN:
  - NIEMALS wait_for_load_state("networkidle") - haengt bei CDP
  - NUR wait_for_timeout() verwenden
"""

import asyncio
import logging
import os

from dotenv import load_dotenv

from idis_connect import IdisConnection
from idis_selectors import (
    SEL_LOGIN_USER, SEL_LOGIN_PASS,
    SEL_PROCESS_AROS,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
load_dotenv()


async def login(conn: IdisConnection) -> bool:
    """Login in IDIS via LDAP.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection-Instanz

    Returns:
        True bei Erfolg

    Raises:
        ValueError: Credentials fehlen
        RuntimeError: Login fehlgeschlagen
    """
    username = os.getenv("IDIS_USERNAME", "")
    password = os.getenv("IDIS_PASSWORD", "")

    if not username or not password:
        raise ValueError("IDIS Credentials fehlen in .env (IDIS_USERNAME/IDIS_PASSWORD)")

    page = conn.page
    url = conn.url

    try:
        logger.info("IDIS Login: %s", url)
        await page.goto(url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

        await conn.screenshot("login_page_before")

        # Felder ausfuellen
        await page.fill(SEL_LOGIN_USER, username)
        await page.fill(SEL_LOGIN_PASS, password)
        logger.info("Login-Felder ausgefuellt")

        # Submit: mehrere Selektoren probieren
        submit_clicked = False
        for selector in [
            'button[type="submit"]',
            'input[type="submit"]',
            'button',
            'input[type="button"]',
            'form button',
            'form input[type="submit"]',
        ]:
            try:
                btn = page.locator(selector).first
                if await btn.is_visible(timeout=1500):
                    btn_text = await btn.evaluate(
                        "el => el.textContent || el.value || ''"
                    )
                    logger.info("Login-Button: %s (text='%s')", selector, btn_text.strip())
                    await btn.click()
                    submit_clicked = True
                    break
            except Exception:
                continue

        if not submit_clicked:
            logger.warning("Kein Submit-Button - versuche Enter-Taste")
            await page.press(SEL_LOGIN_PASS, "Enter")

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
        await conn.screenshot("login_page_after")

        title = await page.title()
        new_url = page.url
        logger.info("Nach Login: Titel='%s', URL='%s'", title, new_url)

        if "Main Menu" not in title and "mainMenu" not in new_url:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Login fehlgeschlagen - Titel: {title}, URL: {new_url}")

        logger.info("IDIS Login erfolgreich")
        return True

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("IDIS Login fehlgeschlagen: %s", e)
        await conn.screenshot("login_error")
        raise


async def navigate_to_process_aros(conn: IdisConnection):
    """Navigiert von Main Menu zu Process AROS Orders.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene + eingeloggte IdisConnection-Instanz

    Raises:
        RuntimeError: Navigation fehlgeschlagen
    """
    page = conn.page
    logger.info("Navigiere zu Process AROS Orders...")
    await page.click(SEL_PROCESS_AROS)
    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

    title = await page.title()
    if "Process AROS" not in title:
        raise RuntimeError(f"Navigation fehlgeschlagen - Titel: {title}")
    logger.info("Process AROS Orders geladen")


async def navigate_back_to_main(conn: IdisConnection):
    """Navigiert zurueck zum Main Menu.

    Wird nach export/amend aufgerufen, weil IDIS auf
    orderExport.faces bleibt.
    """
    page = conn.page
    title = await page.title()
    if "Main Menu" in title:
        logger.debug("Bereits auf Main Menu")
        return

    logger.info("Navigiere zurueck zum Main Menu...")
    await page.goto(conn.url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

    title = await page.title()
    if "Main Menu" not in title:
        logger.warning("Zuruecknavigierung: Titel ist '%s', erwartet 'Main Menu'", title)
    else:
        logger.info("Main Menu erreicht")


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standalone Test
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
async def _test():
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
    conn = IdisConnection()
    await conn.connect()

    await login(conn)
    await navigate_to_process_aros(conn)

    print("Login + Navigate OK")
    print(f"  Titel: {await conn.page.title()}")
    print(f"  URL:   {conn.page.url}")

    await conn.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(_test())

nacke/idis-packaging.code:
"""
idis_packaging.py - Bundle Size in IDIS anpassen (Packaging-Formular).

Wird NUR aufgerufen wenn Bundle Size Master != Bundle Size IDIS.
Oeffnet Packaging-Formular, setzt neue Bundle Size, Recalculate, Save, Back.

Selektoren (aus nacke-projekt.md, verifiziert):
  - Packaging-Button: mainForm:_idJsp121:{idx}:_idJsp219
  - Bundle Size Input: mainForm:_idJsp89
  - Recalculate:       mainForm:_idJsp86
  - Save (Packaging):  mainForm:_idJsp197
  - Back (Packaging):  mainForm:_idJsp194
"""

import asyncio
import logging

from idis_connect import IdisConnection
from idis_selectors import SEL_ROW_SECOND_BTN_TPL

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# Packaging-Formular Selektoren
SEL_PKG_BUNDLE_INPUT = 'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp89"]'
SEL_PKG_RECALCULATE = 'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp86"]'
SEL_PKG_SAVE = 'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp197"]'
SEL_PKG_BACK = 'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp194"]'


def find_bundle_mismatches(
    table_orders: list[dict],
    bundle_map: dict[str, float],
) -> list[dict]:
    """Vergleicht Bundle Size aus IDIS-Tabelle mit Master.

    Args:
        table_orders: Zeilen aus der IDIS Result-Tabelle (get_result_table_data)
        bundle_map: aros_key -> bundle_size aus Master

    Returns:
        Liste von UNIQUE Mismatches (1x pro AROS-Key, erste Zeile):
        {order_id, row_idx, aros_key, bundle_idis, bundle_master, all_order_ids}
    """
    mismatches_by_key = {}
    all_mismatch_orders = []

    for order in table_orders:
        order_id = order.get("order_number", "")
        row_idx = order.get("row_index")
        if not order_id or row_idx is None:
            continue

        parts = order_id.split("-")
        aros_key = "-".join(parts[:4]) if len(parts) >= 4 else order_id

        bundle_master = bundle_map.get(aros_key, 0)
        if bundle_master <= 0:
            continue

        bundle_idis_str = str(order.get("bundle", "0")).strip()
        try:
            bundle_idis = float(bundle_idis_str)
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            bundle_idis = 0.0

        if bundle_idis != bundle_master:
            all_mismatch_orders.append(order_id)
            # Nur erste Zeile pro AROS-Key merken (Bundle aendern reicht 1x)
            if aros_key not in mismatches_by_key:
                mismatches_by_key[aros_key] = {
                    "order_id": order_id,
                    "row_index": row_idx,
                    "aros_key": aros_key,
                    "bundle_idis": bundle_idis,
                    "bundle_master": bundle_master,
                    "all_order_ids": [order_id],
                }
            else:
                mismatches_by_key[aros_key]["all_order_ids"].append(order_id)

    mismatches = list(mismatches_by_key.values())

    if mismatches:
        logger.warning(
            "%d AROS-Keys mit Bundle-Mismatch (%d Order-Zeilen betroffen): %s",
            len(mismatches),
            len(all_mismatch_orders),
            ", ".join(m["aros_key"] for m in mismatches),
        )
    else:
        logger.info("Keine Bundle-Mismatches gefunden")

    return mismatches


async def fix_single_packaging(
    conn: IdisConnection,
    row_idx: int,
    order_id: str,
    bundle_master: float,
    bundle_idis: float,
    dry_run: bool = False,
) -> bool:
    """Oeffnet Packaging fuer eine Order, setzt neue Bundle Size.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (Result-Tabelle sichtbar)
        row_idx: Zeilen-Index in der Result-Tabelle
        order_id: Order-Nummer (fuer Logging)
        bundle_master: Korrekte Bundle Size aus Master
        bundle_idis: Aktuelle Bundle Size in IDIS
        dry_run: True = nur loggen, nicht aendern

    Returns:
        True bei Erfolg
    """
    page = conn.page

    logger.info(
        "  Packaging: %s (row %d) IDIS=%.0f -> Master=%.0f%s",
        order_id, row_idx, bundle_idis, bundle_master,
        " [DRY-RUN]" if dry_run else "",
    )

    try:
        # 1. Packaging-Button klicken
        pkg_name = f"mainForm:_idJsp121:{row_idx}:_idJsp219"
        pkg_sel = f'input[name="{pkg_name}"]'
        await page.click(pkg_sel)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)

        await conn.screenshot(f"packaging_form_{order_id}")

        # 2. Bundle Size Input leeren und neuen Wert setzen
        bundle_input = page.locator(SEL_PKG_BUNDLE_INPUT)
        if await bundle_input.count() == 0:
            logger.error("  Bundle Size Input nicht gefunden fuer %s", order_id)
            await conn.screenshot(f"packaging_error_no_input_{order_id}")
            return False

        await bundle_input.click(click_count=3)
        await bundle_input.fill(str(int(bundle_master)))
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)

        # 3. Recalculate
        await page.click(SEL_PKG_RECALCULATE)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)

        await conn.screenshot(f"packaging_after_recalc_{order_id}")

        # 4. Save — nur wenn KEIN Dry-Run
        if dry_run:
            logger.info("  Packaging DRY-RUN: %s Bundle eingegeben + Recalculate, NICHT gespeichert", order_id)
        else:
            await page.click(SEL_PKG_SAVE)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
            logger.info("  Packaging OK: %s (%.0f -> %.0f)", order_id, bundle_idis, bundle_master)

        # 5. Back zur Result-Tabelle
        await page.click(SEL_PKG_BACK)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)

        return True

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("  Packaging FEHLER %s: %s", order_id, e)
        await conn.screenshot(f"packaging_error_{order_id}")

        # Versuche zurueck zur Tabelle
        try:
            await page.click(SEL_PKG_BACK)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        except Exception:
            pass

        return False


async def fix_all_packaging(
    conn: IdisConnection,
    mismatches: list[dict],
    dry_run: bool = False,
) -> list[dict]:
    """Korrigiert Bundle Size fuer alle Mismatches.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection
        mismatches: Output von find_bundle_mismatches()
        dry_run: True = nur loggen

    Returns:
        Liste von Ergebnis-Dicts fuer den Report:
        {order_id, aros_key, bundle_idis, bundle_master, status}
    """
    results = []

    for mm in mismatches:
        ok = await fix_single_packaging(
            conn,
            mm["row_index"],
            mm["order_id"],
            mm["bundle_master"],
            mm["bundle_idis"],
            dry_run=dry_run,
        )
        results.append({
            "order_id": mm["order_id"],
            "aros_key": mm["aros_key"],
            "bundle_idis": mm["bundle_idis"],
            "bundle_master": mm["bundle_master"],
            "all_order_ids": mm.get("all_order_ids", [mm["order_id"]]),
            "status": "ok" if ok else "error",
        })

    ok_count = sum(1 for r in results if r["status"] == "ok")
    err_count = len(results) - ok_count

    total_orders = sum(len(r.get("all_order_ids", [])) for r in results)
    logger.info(
        "Packaging: %d/%d AROS-Keys korrigiert (%d Order-Zeilen betroffen)%s%s",
        ok_count, len(results), total_orders,
        f", {err_count} Fehler" if err_count > 0 else "",
        " [DRY-RUN]" if dry_run else "",
    )

    return results


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standalone Test
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
if __name__ == "__main__":
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
    print("idis_packaging.py - Module-Check OK")
    print(f"  Bundle Input: {SEL_PKG_BUNDLE_INPUT}")
    print(f"  Recalculate:  {SEL_PKG_RECALCULATE}")
    print(f"  Save:         {SEL_PKG_SAVE}")
    print(f"  Back:         {SEL_PKG_BACK}")

"""
idis_save_back.py - Save klicken + Back zur Result-Tabelle.

Einzeln testbar: python idis_save_back.py
Braucht: idis_connect.py, idis_selectors.py

REGELN:
  - NIEMALS wait_for_load_state("networkidle") - haengt bei CDP
  - NUR wait_for_timeout() verwenden
  - Save Button = mainForm:_idJsp159 (NICHT vertauschen mit Back!)
  - Back Button = mainForm:_idJsp155 (zurueck zur Result-Tabelle)
  - Cancel Button = mainForm:_idJsp157 (Aenderungen verwerfen)
"""

import asyncio
import logging

from idis_connect import IdisConnection
from idis_selectors import (
    SEL_AMEND_SAVE, SEL_AMEND_BACK, SEL_AMEND_CANCEL,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


async def save_amend(conn: IdisConnection, order_id: str = ""):
    """Klickt den Save-Button im Amend-Formular.

    WICHTIG: Save = mainForm:_idJsp159 (VERIFIZIERT)
    NICHT verwechseln mit Back (_idJsp155) oder Cancel (_idJsp157)!

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (Amend-Formular offen)
        order_id: Order-Nummer fuer Logging
    """
    page = conn.page

    try:
        logger.info("  Save klicken: %s (Selector: %s)", order_id, SEL_AMEND_SAVE)
        await page.click(SEL_AMEND_SAVE)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
        logger.info("  Save erfolgreich: %s", order_id)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("  Save-Button Fehler fuer %s: %s", order_id, e)
        await conn.screenshot(f"save_error_{order_id}")
        raise


async def back_to_table(conn: IdisConnection):
    """Klickt Back-Button um zur Result-Tabelle zurueckzukehren.

    WICHTIG: Back = mainForm:_idJsp155 (VERIFIZIERT)
    Wird nach Save aufgerufen, ODER wenn stop_before_save=True.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (Amend-Formular offen)
    """
    page = conn.page

    try:
        logger.info("  Back zur Tabelle (Selector: %s)", SEL_AMEND_BACK)
        await page.click(SEL_AMEND_BACK)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        logger.info("  Zurueck in Result-Tabelle")
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning("  Back-Button Fehler: %s", e)
        await conn.screenshot("back_error")


async def cancel_amend(conn: IdisConnection, order_id: str = ""):
    """Cancel-Button: Aenderungen verwerfen und zurueck.

    Cancel = mainForm:_idJsp157

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (Amend-Formular offen)
        order_id: Order-Nummer fuer Logging
    """
    page = conn.page

    try:
        logger.info("  Cancel Amend: %s (Selector: %s)", order_id, SEL_AMEND_CANCEL)
        await page.click(SEL_AMEND_CANCEL)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
        logger.info("  Cancel erfolgreich: %s", order_id)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning("  Cancel-Button Fehler fuer %s: %s", order_id, e)
        await conn.screenshot(f"cancel_error_{order_id}")


async def save_and_back(conn: IdisConnection, order_id: str = ""):
    """Convenience: Save + Back in einem Aufruf.

    Args:
        conn: Verbundene IdisConnection (Amend-Formular offen)
        order_id: Order-Nummer fuer Logging
    """
    await save_amend(conn, order_id)
    await back_to_table(conn)


# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standalone Test
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
async def _test():
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
    print("idis_save_back.py - Module-Check OK")
    print(f"  Save Selector:   {SEL_AMEND_SAVE}")
    print(f"  Back Selector:   {SEL_AMEND_BACK}")
    print(f"  Cancel Selector: {SEL_AMEND_CANCEL}")
    print("  Fuer echten Test: VPN + IDIS Login + offenes Amend-Formular noetig")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(_test())

"""nacke_email.py - Start/End Email fuer NackeScript Pipeline.""" import smtplib import ssl import os import sys import json import logging from email.mime.text import MIMEText from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart from datetime import datetime from pathlib import Path from dotenv import load_dotenv load_dotenv() logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) SMTP_HOST = os.getenv("SMTP_HOST", "smtp.uxuix.de") SMTP_PORT = int(os.getenv("SMTP_PORT", "465")) SMTP_USER = os.getenv("SMTP_USER", "") SMTP_PASS = os.getenv("SMTP_PASS", "") MAIL_FROM = SMTP_USER # Test: nur an Bodo | Production: Kunde + CC MAIL_TO_TEST = "bodo.buschick@uxuix.de" MAIL_TO_PROD = ["aros@nacke-logistik.de", "o.basedow@nacke-logistik.de"] MAIL_CC_PROD = ["ch.walter@nacke-logistik.de", "bodo.buschick@uxuix.de"] def send_email(subject: str, html_body: str, test_mode: bool = True) -> bool: """Sendet eine Email via SMTP SSL. Args: test_mode: True = nur an Bodo, False = an Kunde + CC """ try: recipients = [MAIL_TO_TEST] if test_mode else MAIL_TO_PROD cc = [] if test_mode else MAIL_CC_PROD msg = MIMEMultipart("alternative") msg["Subject"] = subject msg["From"] = MAIL_FROM msg["To"] = ", ".join(recipients) if cc: msg["Cc"] = ", ".join(cc) msg.attach(MIMEText(html_body, "html", "utf-8")) all_recipients = recipients + cc context = ssl.create_default_context() context.check_hostname = False context.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE with smtplib.SMTP_SSL(SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, context=context, timeout=15) as server: server.login(SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS) server.sendmail(MAIL_FROM, all_recipients, msg.as_string()) logger.info("Email gesendet: %s -> %s", subject, ", ".join(all_recipients)) return True except Exception as e: logger.error("Email senden fehlgeschlagen: %s", e) return False def send_start_email(mode: str = "production", test_mode: bool = True): """Sendet Start-Benachrichtigung.""" ts = datetime.now().strftime("%d.%m.%Y %H:%M") mode_color = "#ffc107" if "dry" in mode.lower() else "#28a745" subject = f"NackeScript Pipeline gestartet - {ts}" html = f"""

NackeScript Pipeline gestartet

{mode.upper()} {ts}

Maschine:{os.environ.get('COMPUTERNAME', 'nacke-vm')}
Modus:{mode}
Gestartet:{ts}

UXUIX AI Pipeline - automatische Benachrichtigung

""" return send_email(subject, html, test_mode=test_mode) def send_end_email(result: dict, test_mode: bool = True): """Sendet End-Benachrichtigung mit Report.""" ts = datetime.now().strftime("%d.%m.%Y %H:%M") status = result.get("status", "unknown") mode = result.get("mode", "unknown") duration = result.get("duration_seconds", 0) color = "#28a745" if status == "completed" else "#dc3545" subject = f"NackeScript {status.upper()} - {mode} - {ts}" steps = result.get("steps", {}) oc = steps.get("overconfirmation", {}) pl = steps.get("picklists", {}) exp_pre = steps.get("export_pre", {}) exp_post = steps.get("export_post", {}) error = result.get("error", "") rows_html = "" rows_html += f"Export (Pre){exp_pre.get('rows', 0)} Zeilen" rows_html += f"Amendments berechnet{oc.get('amendments_calculated', 0)}" rows_html += f"Amendments applied{oc.get('amendments_applied', 0)}" rows_html += f"Export (Post){exp_post.get('rows', 0)} Zeilen" rows_html += f"Picklisten{pl.get('generated', 0)}" rows_html += f"Fehlende Masterdaten{pl.get('skipped_missing', 0)}" # Fehlende Masterdaten einzeln auflisten missing_keys = pl.get("missing_keys", []) missing_html = "" if missing_keys: items = "".join(f"
  • {k}
    • " for k in missing_keys[:30]) trunc = f"
  • ... und {len(missing_keys) - 30} weitere
    • " if len(missing_keys) > 30 else "" missing_html = f"""

    Fehlende Masterdaten ({len(missing_keys)})

      {items}{trunc}
    """ # Fehlgeschlagene Amendments auflisten amend_errors = result.get("_amend_errors", []) amend_err_html = "" if amend_errors: err_items = "".join(f"
  • {e}
    • " for e in amend_errors[:20]) amend_err_html = f"""

    Fehlgeschlagene Orders ({len(amend_errors)})

      {err_items}
    """ # Packaging Mismatches aus JSON-Datei lesen packaging_html = "" try: pkg_path = Path("logs/packaging_mismatches.json") if pkg_path.exists(): pkg_data = json.loads(pkg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) if pkg_data: pkg_rows = "".join( f"{p['order_id']}{p['bundle_idis']:.0f}" f"{p['bundle_master']:.0f}{p['status']}" for p in pkg_data ) packaging_html = f"""

    Packaging Korrektur ({len(pkg_data)} AROS-Keys)

    {pkg_rows}
    OrderIDIS BundleMaster BundleStatus
    """ except Exception: pass # Missing Weights aus JSON-Datei lesen weights_html = "" try: mw_path = Path("logs/missing_weights.json") if mw_path.exists(): mw_data = json.loads(mw_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) if mw_data: mw_items = "".join(f"
  • {oid}
    • " for oid in mw_data) weights_html = f"""

    Fehlende Gewichte ({len(mw_data)} Orders)

    Diese Orders wurden NICHT hochgesetzt. Gewichte muessen manuell erfasst werden.

      {mw_items}
    """ except Exception: pass error_html = "" if error: error_html = f'

    Fehler: {error}

    ' html = f"""

    NackeScript Report {result.get('date', ts)}

    {status.upper()} {mode} | {duration:.0f}s ({duration/60:.1f} min)

    {rows_html}
    SchrittWert
    {packaging_html} {weights_html} {missing_html} {amend_err_html} {error_html}

    UXUIX AI Pipeline - automatische Benachrichtigung

    """ return send_email(subject, html, test_mode=test_mode) # CLI if __name__ == "__main__": logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s") if len(sys.argv) < 2: print("Usage: python nacke_email.py [test|start|end ] [--prod]") sys.exit(1) cmd = sys.argv[1] is_prod = "--prod" in sys.argv if cmd == "test": ok = send_email( "NackeScript Testmail", "

    Testmail

    SMTP funktioniert!

    " + datetime.now().strftime("%d.%m.%Y %H:%M:%S") + "

    ", test_mode=not is_prod, ) print("OK" if ok else "FEHLER") elif cmd == "start": mode = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 and not sys.argv[2].startswith("-") else "production" ok = send_start_email(mode, test_mode=not is_prod) print("OK" if ok else "FEHLER") elif cmd == "end": result_file = None for arg in sys.argv[2:]: if not arg.startswith("-"): result_file = arg break if not result_file: print("Usage: python nacke_email.py end [--prod]") sys.exit(1) with open(result_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f: result = json.load(f) ok = send_end_email(result, test_mode=not is_prod) print("OK" if ok else "FEHLER")
