""" report.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Notifications + HTML Report + Push Start-Notification, HTML-Report-Generierung, Report-Push via Edge Function. """ import json import urllib.request from datetime import date, datetime from config import ( REPORT, DRY_RUN, IDIS_USER, REPORT_URL, MACHINE_TOKEN, EMAIL_TO, EMAIL_CC, EMAIL_BCC, P, ) # ====================================================================== # START-BENACHRICHTIGUNG # ====================================================================== def push_start_notification(): """Sendet Start-Email via Supabase Edge Function.""" if not REPORT_URL or not MACHINE_TOKEN: P(" Start-Notification uebersprungen (kein REPORT_URL oder MACHINE_TOKEN)") return today = date.today().strftime("%d.%m.%Y") mode = "DRY RUN" if DRY_RUN else "PRODUCTION" html = f"""

GV Overconfirmation gestartet

{today} | {IDIS_USER} | {mode} | v2.0

IDIS User {IDIS_USER} wird verarbeitet (bidirektional: oben + unten gleichzeitig).

""" try: payload = { "machine_token": MACHINE_TOKEN, "report_type": "gv_overconfirmation_start", "email_to": EMAIL_TO, "email_cc": EMAIL_CC, "email_bcc": EMAIL_BCC, "data": {"date": str(date.today()), "user": IDIS_USER, "mode": mode}, "html_report": html, } body = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8") req = urllib.request.Request( REPORT_URL, data=body, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST", ) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) result = json.loads(resp.read()) if result.get("email", {}).get("sent"): P(f" Start-Notification gesendet") else: P(f" Start-Notification: {result.get('email', {}).get('error', 'unbekannt')[:60]}") except Exception as e: P(f" Start-Notification fehlgeschlagen: {str(e)[:60]}") # ====================================================================== # REPORT HTML GENERIERUNG # ====================================================================== def generate_report_html(): """Generiert den vollstaendigen HTML-Report.""" today = date.today().strftime("%d.%m.%Y") dur = REPORT["duration_seconds"] dur_str = f"{int(dur // 60)}m {int(dur % 60)}s" td = 'style="padding:6px 12px;border:1px solid #ddd"' td_c = 'style="padding:6px 12px;border:1px solid #ddd;text-align:center"' td_s = 'style="padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid #ddd;font-size:13px"' mode_badge = ('DRY RUN' if DRY_RUN else 'PRODUCTION') bi_badge = ('BIDIREKTIONAL' if REPORT["bidirectional"] else 'ZIGZAG') # Zusammenfassung summary_html = f"""
User{REPORT['user']}
Orders gesamt{REPORT['total_orders']}
Verarbeitet{REPORT['total_amended']}
Already processed{REPORT['total_already_processed']}
Skipped (Bundle=0){REPORT['total_skipped']}
Fehler{REPORT['total_errors']}
""" # Amendments Detail amend_html = "" if REPORT["amended_details"]: amend_rows = "" for a in REPORT["amended_details"]: amend_rows += f""" {a['order']} {a.get('direction', '')} {a['ordered']} {a['old_committed']} {a['new_committed']} +{a['delta']} {a['bundle']} """ amend_html = f"""

Hochgesetzte Orders ({len(REPORT['amended_details'])})

{amend_rows}
Order Richtung Bestellt Alt Neu Delta Bundle
""" # Fehler error_html = "" if REPORT["errors"]: error_rows = "" for e in REPORT["errors"]: error_rows += f""" {e['order']} {e['reason']} {e.get('details', '')} """ error_html = f"""

Fehler ({len(REPORT['errors'])})

{error_rows}
Order Grund Details
""" else: error_html = '

Keine Fehler.

' # Warnings warn_html = "" if REPORT["warnings"]: warn_items = "".join(f"
  • {w}
    • " for w in REPORT["warnings"]) warn_html = f'

    Hinweise

      {warn_items}
    ' html = f"""

    GV Spedition OC Report {mode_badge} {bi_badge}

    {today} | {REPORT['user']} | Dauer: {dur_str} | v2.0

    {summary_html} {amend_html} {error_html} {warn_html}
    GV Overconfirmation v2.0 (modular) | Exasync IDIS Automation | {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}
    """ return html # ====================================================================== # REPORT PUSH (Supabase Edge Function) # ====================================================================== def push_report(html_report=""): """Pusht den Report an die Supabase Edge Function und sendet Email.""" if not REPORT_URL or not MACHINE_TOKEN: P(" Report-Push uebersprungen (kein REPORT_URL oder MACHINE_TOKEN)") return try: payload = { "machine_token": MACHINE_TOKEN, "report_type": "gv_overconfirmation", "data": REPORT, "email_to": EMAIL_TO, "email_cc": EMAIL_CC, "email_bcc": EMAIL_BCC, } if html_report: payload["html_report"] = html_report body = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8") req = urllib.request.Request( REPORT_URL, data=body, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST", ) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) result = json.loads(resp.read()) P(f" Report gepusht: {result.get('ok', False)}") email = result.get("email", {}) if email.get("sent"): P(f" Email gesendet an: {email.get('to', EMAIL_TO)}") elif email.get("error"): P(f" Email fehlgeschlagen: {email.get('error', '')[:60]}") except Exception as e: P(f" Report push fehlgeschlagen: {str(e)[:80]}")

gv-overconfirmation-v2/main.name: Main
gv-overconfirmation-v2/main.description: Pipeline-Controller: Config, Browser, Login, Process, Report
gv-overconfirmation-v2/main.code:
"""
main.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Pipeline Orchestrator

Orchestriert alle Module: Browser → Login → AROS → Orders → Processing → Report.
Bidirektionaler Modus mit Zigzag-Fallback.

Usage:
  python main.py                                        # Production
  python main.py --dry-run                              # Kein Save
  python main.py --env-file .env.idis735 --cdp-port 9223
"""

import asyncio
import json
import sys
import time
from datetime import date
from pathlib import Path

# Encoding Fix fuer Windows (charmap-Crash verhindern)
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')

from config import (
    REPORT, DRY_RUN, IDIS_USER, CDP_PORT, ENV_FILE,
    P, report_warning,
)
from browser import start_browser_detached, create_context
from idis import login_idis, navigate_to_aros
from orders import read_table_full, classify_orders
from processor import process_direction, process_zigzag
from report import push_start_notification, generate_report_html, push_report


async def main():
    t_start = time.time()
    Path("reports").mkdir(exist_ok=True)

    mode_str = "DRY RUN" if DRY_RUN else "PRODUCTION"
    P("")
    P("=" * 65)
    P(f"  GV OVERCONFIRMATION v2.0 - {mode_str}")
    P(f"  User: {IDIS_USER} | Port: {CDP_PORT} | Modular")
    P("=" * 65)

    if not IDIS_USER:
        P(f"  WARNUNG: Credentials leer! Pruefe {ENV_FILE}")
        report_warning(f"IDIS Credentials nicht gesetzt ({ENV_FILE})")

    # --- Browser starten ---
    browser, pw = await start_browser_detached()

    try:
        await _run_pipeline(browser, pw, t_start)
    finally:
        try:
            await pw.stop()
            P("  [Cleanup] Playwright disconnected")
        except Exception:
            pass


async def _run_pipeline(browser, pw, t_start):
    """Hauptpipeline: Login, Bidirektional/Zigzag, Report."""

    # --- Context 1 (TOP bot) ---
    ctx_top, page_top = await create_context(browser)
    login_ok = await login_idis(page_top, "TOP")
    if not login_ok:
        P("  Login fehlgeschlagen - Abbruch")
        await ctx_top.close()
        return

    # --- Start-Benachrichtigung ---
    push_start_notification()

    # --- Navigate TOP to AROS orders ---
    await navigate_to_aros(page_top, "TOP")

    # --- Order-Liste lesen ---
    orders = await read_table_full(page_top)
    P(f"  {len(orders)} Orders geladen")
    REPORT["total_orders"] = len(orders)

    if not orders:
        P("  Keine Orders - fertig")
        REPORT["duration_seconds"] = round(time.time() - t_start, 1)
        html = generate_report_html()
        push_report(html)
        await ctx_top.close()
        return

    # --- Orders klassifizieren ---
    valid_orders = classify_orders(orders)

    P(f"  Zu verarbeiten: {len(valid_orders)} | Skipped: {REPORT['total_skipped']}")

    if not valid_orders:
        P("  Keine Orders mit Bundle > 0 - fertig")
        REPORT["duration_seconds"] = round(time.time() - t_start, 1)
        html = generate_report_html()
        push_report(html)
        await ctx_top.close()
        return

    do_save = not DRY_RUN
    N = len(valid_orders)

    # --- Bidirektional versuchen (2 Contexts) ---
    bidirectional = False
    ctx_bot = None
    page_bot = None

    try:
        ctx_bot, page_bot = await create_context(browser)
        login_ok_bot = await login_idis(page_bot, "BOT")
        if login_ok_bot:
            await navigate_to_aros(page_bot, "BOT")
            bidirectional = True
            P(f"  Bidirektional aktiv: TOP (0->{N-1}) + BOT ({N-1}->0)")
        else:
            P(f"  BOT Login fehlgeschlagen - Fallback auf Zigzag")
            await ctx_bot.close()
            ctx_bot = None
    except Exception as e:
        P(f"  Zweiter Context fehlgeschlagen: {str(e)[:60]}")
        P(f"  Fallback auf Zigzag-Modus")
        if ctx_bot:
            try:
                await ctx_bot.close()
            except Exception:
                pass
            ctx_bot = None

    REPORT["bidirectional"] = bidirectional

    # --- Verarbeitung ---
    if bidirectional:
        processed = set()

        top_indices = list(range(N))
        bot_indices = list(range(N - 1, -1, -1))

        P(f"\n  === BIDIREKTIONAL START ===")

        top_stats, bot_stats = await asyncio.gather(
            process_direction(page_top, valid_orders, top_indices, processed, do_save, "TOP"),
            process_direction(page_bot, valid_orders, bot_indices, processed, do_save, "BOT"),
        )

        # Merge stats
        for stats in [top_stats, bot_stats]:
            REPORT["total_amended"] += stats["amended"]
            REPORT["total_already_processed"] += stats["already_processed"]
            REPORT["total_errors"] += stats["errors"]
            REPORT["amended_details"].extend(stats["amended_details"])
            REPORT["already_processed_details"].extend(stats["already_processed_details"])

        P(f"\n  === BIDIREKTIONAL FERTIG ===")
        P(f"  TOP: {top_stats['amended']} amended, {top_stats['already_processed']} already")
        P(f"  BOT: {bot_stats['amended']} amended, {bot_stats['already_processed']} already")

    else:
        # Zigzag Fallback
        await process_zigzag(page_top, valid_orders, do_save)

    # --- Report ---
    REPORT["duration_seconds"] = round(time.time() - t_start, 1)

    P("")
    P("=" * 65)
    P("  REPORT")
    P("=" * 65)
    P(f"  Datum:        {date.today()}")
    P(f"  User:         {IDIS_USER}")
    P(f"  Modus:        {'DRY RUN' if DRY_RUN else 'PRODUCTION'} | {'Bidirektional' if bidirectional else 'Zigzag'}")
    P(f"  Dauer:        {REPORT['duration_seconds']:.1f}s")
    P(f"  Orders total: {REPORT['total_orders']}")
    P(f"  Verarbeitet:  {REPORT['total_amended']}")
    P(f"  Already OK:   {REPORT['total_already_processed']}")
    P(f"  Skipped:      {REPORT['total_skipped']}")
    P(f"  Fehler:       {REPORT['total_errors']}")

    if REPORT["amended_details"]:
        P("\n  HOCHGESETZTE ORDERS:")
        for a in REPORT["amended_details"]:
            P(f"    {a['order']:30s} [{a.get('direction','')}] "
              f"Bestellt={a['ordered']:>5}  Alt={a['old_committed']:>5}  "
              f"Neu={a['new_committed']:>5}  Delta=+{a['delta']:<4}  Bundle={a['bundle']}")

    if REPORT["errors"]:
        P("\n  FEHLER:")
        for e in REPORT["errors"]:
            P(f"    {e['order']}: {e['reason']} - {e.get('details', '')}")

    if REPORT["warnings"]:
        P(f"\n  WARNUNGEN ({len(REPORT['warnings'])}):")
        for w in REPORT["warnings"]:
            P(f"    - {w}")

    # Report-Dateien
    report_date = date.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    with open(f"reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(REPORT, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    P(f"\n  JSON: reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.json")

    html = generate_report_html()
    with open(f"reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.html", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(html)
    P(f"  HTML: reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.html")

    push_report(html)

    # --- Cleanup ---
    P("\n" + "=" * 65)
    P("  Pipeline abgeschlossen.")
    P("=" * 65)

    try:
        await ctx_top.close()
    except Exception:
        pass
    if ctx_bot:
        try:
            await ctx_bot.close()
        except Exception:
            pass


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())

maut/orchestrator.name: Maut Orchestrator
maut/orchestrator.description: Faehrt 7 Module sequenziell mit state.json + workflow_runs
maut/orchestrator.code:
"""Orchestrator fuer Maut-Pipeline.

Faehrt die 7 Module sequenziell, haelt state.json, persistiert Workflow-Run.
"""
import argparse
import json
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import time
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent))
from lib.common import init_logging, report_workflow_run, load_env  # noqa: E402

ROOT = Path(__file__).parent
MODULES_DIR = ROOT / "modules"
STATE_PATH = ROOT / "state.json"
ARCHIVE_STATES = ROOT / "archive" / "states"

ALL_STEPS = [
    "01_date_calculator",
    "02_shell_login",
    "03_select_account",
    "04_download_data",
    "05_calculate_tolls",
    "05b_enrich_driver",
    "06_upload_results",
    "07_send_report"
]
BROWSER_STEPS = {"02_shell_login", "03_select_account", "04_download_data"}
EMAIL_STEPS = {"07_send_report"}
CRITICAL_STEPS = {
    "01_date_calculator", "02_shell_login", "03_select_account",
    "04_download_data", "05_calculate_tolls"
}


def archive_old_state():
    if not STATE_PATH.exists():
        return
    ARCHIVE_STATES.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    target = ARCHIVE_STATES / f"state_{ts}.json"
    shutil.move(str(STATE_PATH), str(target))
    files = sorted(ARCHIVE_STATES.glob("state_*.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime)
    for old in files[:-30]:
        old.unlink()


def init_state(test_mode):
    state = {
        "run_id": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"),
        "test_mode": test_mode,
        "step_status": {},
        "data": {},
        "errors": {}
    }
    STATE_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return state


def run_step(step, state_path):
    """Ruft modules/<step>.py als Subprozess auf. Gibt returncode zurueck."""
    module_file = MODULES_DIR / f"{step}.py"
    proc = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, str(module_file), "--state", str(state_path)]
    )
    return proc.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Maut-Pipeline Orchestrator")
    parser.add_argument("--test", action="store_true", help="Email nur an Bodo")
    parser.add_argument("--skip-email", action="store_true", help="07_send_report ueberspringen")
    parser.add_argument("--calc-only", action="store_true",
                        help="Browser-Steps (02-04) ueberspringen, nutzt vorhandene XLSX")
    parser.add_argument("--resume-from", type=str, default=None,
                        help="Ab gegebenem Step neu starten (state.json muss existieren)")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    log = init_logging("orchestrator")
    log.info("=" * 60)
    log.info("  MAUTBERECHNUNG - Pipeline Start")
    log.info("=" * 60)

    env_path = ROOT / ".env"
    if env_path.exists():
        import os
        for k, v in load_env(env_path).items():
            os.environ.setdefault(k, v)

    start_time = time.time()

    if args.resume_from:
        if not STATE_PATH.exists():
            log.error("--resume-from gesetzt aber state.json fehlt")
            sys.exit(1)
        state = json.loads(STATE_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        log.info(f"Resume from {args.resume_from}, run_id={state['run_id']}")
    else:
        archive_old_state()
        state = init_state(test_mode=args.test)
        log.info(f"Neuer Run: {state['run_id']}, test_mode={args.test}")

    started_at = datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z"

    failed_step = None
    resume_active = bool(args.resume_from)
    for step in ALL_STEPS:
        if args.calc_only and step in BROWSER_STEPS:
            log.info(f"-> Skip {step} (--calc-only)")
            continue
        if args.skip_email and step in EMAIL_STEPS:
            log.info(f"-> Skip {step} (--skip-email)")
            continue
        if resume_active:
            if step != args.resume_from and state["step_status"].get(step) == "ok":
                log.info(f"-> Skip {step} (bereits ok in vorigem Lauf)")
                continue
            if step == args.resume_from:
                resume_active = False  # ab hier normal weiter

        log.info(f">> Step: {step}")
        rc = run_step(step, STATE_PATH)
        state = json.loads(STATE_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        status = state["step_status"].get(step)
        if rc != 0 or status == "error":
            log.error(f"Step {step} failed (rc={rc}, status={status})")
            log.error(f"  errors: {state.get('errors', {}).get(step)}")
            if step in CRITICAL_STEPS:
                failed_step = step
                break
            else:
                log.warning(f"Step {step} nicht-fatal — weiter mit naechstem Schritt")

    duration = time.time() - start_time
    finished_at = datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z"

    stats = {
        "steps_completed": sum(1 for s in state["step_status"].values() if s == "ok"),
        "steps_failed": sum(1 for s in state["step_status"].values() if s == "error"),
        "failed_step": failed_step,
        "anomaly_count": state["data"].get("anomaly_count"),
        "kennzeichen_mit_abweichung": len(state["data"].get("fehler_liste", [])),
        "xlsx_file": Path(state["data"].get("xlsx_path", "")).name if state["data"].get("xlsx_path") else None,
        "email_sent": state["data"].get("email_sent"),
        "duration_seconds": round(duration, 1)
    }

    overall_status = "error" if failed_step else "success"
    error_details = state["errors"].get(failed_step) if failed_step else None
    try:
        report_workflow_run(
            workflow="maut",
            status=overall_status,
            stats=stats,
            error_details=error_details,
            started_at=started_at,
            finished_at=finished_at
        )
    except Exception as e:
        log.warning(f"workflow_runs report failed: {e}")

    log.info("")
    log.info(f"=== FERTIG ({duration:.1f}s, status={overall_status}) ===")
    sys.exit(0 if overall_status == "success" else 1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

maut/lib.name: Maut Shared Library
maut/lib.description: env loader, state IO, logging, supabase_post
maut/lib.code:
"""Shared library for Maut pipeline modules.

Functions:
    load_env(path)              -> dict
    read_state(path)            -> dict
    write_state(path, state)    -> None  (atomic)
    init_logging(module, log_dir=None) -> Logger
    supabase_post(endpoint, payload, token=None) -> {status, body}
    report_workflow_run(workflow, status, ...)   -> {status, body}
"""
import json
import logging
import socket
import urllib.error
import urllib.request
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

SUPABASE_URL = "https://crslpxgwxjmovrhyxiim.supabase.co"


def load_env(path):
    """Liest .env-Datei und gibt dict zurueck. Tolerant gegen BOM, Kommentare,
    leere Zeilen und Anfuehrungszeichen."""
    path = Path(path)
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    env = {}
    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8-sig")
    for line in text.splitlines():
        line = line.strip()
        if not line or line.startswith("#"):
            continue
        if "=" not in line:
            continue
        key, val = line.split("=", 1)
        key = key.strip()
        val = val.strip()
        if (val.startswith('"') and val.endswith('"')) or (val.startswith("'") and val.endswith("'")):
            val = val[1:-1]
        env[key] = val
    return env


def read_state(path):
    """Liest state.json und gibt dict zurueck."""
    path = Path(path)
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def write_state(path, state):
    """Schreibt state.json atomar (write-then-rename)."""
    path = Path(path)
    tmp = path.with_suffix(path.suffix + ".tmp")
    tmp.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
    tmp.replace(path)


def init_logging(module_name, log_dir=None):
    """Initialisiert Logger fuer ein Modul. Schreibt nach logs/maut_{date}.log
    UND nach stdout. Format: [ts] [LEVEL] [module] message."""
    if log_dir is None:
        log_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "logs"
    log_dir = Path(log_dir)
    log_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    log_file = log_dir / f"maut_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}.log"

    logger = logging.getLogger(f"maut.{module_name}")
    if logger.handlers:
        return logger
    logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

    fmt = logging.Formatter(
        f"%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] [{module_name}] %(message)s"
    )
    fh = logging.FileHandler(log_file, encoding="utf-8")
    fh.setFormatter(fmt)
    sh = logging.StreamHandler()
    sh.setFormatter(fmt)
    logger.addHandler(fh)
    logger.addHandler(sh)
    return logger


def supabase_post(endpoint, payload, token=None, timeout=15):
    """POST an Supabase Edge Function. Gibt {status, body} zurueck."""
    url = f"{SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/{endpoint}"
    body = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=body, method="POST")
    req.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json")
    if token:
        req.add_header("Authorization", f"Bearer {token}")
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout) as resp:
            return {"status": resp.status, "body": resp.read().decode("utf-8")}
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        return {"status": e.code, "body": e.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")}


def report_workflow_run(workflow, status, machine=None, stats=None,
                         error_details=None, started_at=None, finished_at=None,
                         token=None):
    """Schreibt 1 Eintrag in workflow_runs (per Edge Function ggf. anpassen)."""
    payload = {
        "workflow": workflow,
        "status": status,
        "machine": machine or socket.gethostname(),
        "started_at": started_at or datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z",
        "finished_at": finished_at or datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z",
        "stats": stats or {},
        "error_details": error_details
    }
    return supabase_post("workflow-run-insert", payload, token=token)

    }

    overall_status = "error" if failed_step else "success"

            stats=stats,
            error_details=error_details,
            started_at=started_at,
            finished_at=finished_at
        )
    except Exception as e:
        log.warning(f"workflow_runs report failed: {e}")

    log.info("")
    log.info(f"=== FERTIG ({duration:.1f}s, status={overall_status}) ===")
    sys.exit(0 if overall_status == "success" else 1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

linkedin/run-connect-cron.name: LinkedIn Cron-Wrapper
linkedin/run-connect-cron.description: Generic Cron-Wrapper fuer LinkedIn-Auto-Connect: Earliest-Date Skip, Xvfb-Display pro Account, Singleton-Lock Cleanup, .env-source, Logging. Aufruf: run-connect.sh <ACCOUNT> <MAX_CONNECTS> [EARLIEST_DATE]
linkedin/run-connect-cron.code:
#!/bin/bash
# Generic Auto-Connect Cron-Wrapper fuer LinkedIn Multi-Account-VM
#
# Aufruf: run-connect.sh <ACCOUNT> <MAX_CONNECTS> [EARLIEST_RUN_DATE]
# Bsp:    run-connect.sh michael 14 2026-05-05
#
# Features:
# - Xvfb virtuelles Display pro Account (DISPLAY_NUM = 90 + char-summe(account) % 9)
# - Earliest-Date Skip (verhindert Runs vor Wochenlimit-Reset)
# - Singleton-Lock Cleanup
# - Logging in /home/exasync/logs/cron-{account}-{ts}.log

set -u
ACCOUNT="${1:?account required}"
MAX_CONNECTS="${2:?max_connects required}"
EARLIEST="${3:-1970-01-01}"

LOG_DIR=/home/exasync/logs
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
TS=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
LOG="$LOG_DIR/cron-$ACCOUNT-$TS.log"

logmsg() { echo "[$(date -Is)] [$1] $2" | tee -a "$LOG"; }

TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
if [[ "$TODAY" < "$EARLIEST" ]]; then
  logmsg INFO "Skip — heute=$TODAY < earliest=$EARLIEST"
  exit 0
fi

if [ -f /home/exasync/linkedin/.env ]; then
  set -a; source /home/exasync/linkedin/.env; set +a
else
  logmsg WARN "/home/exasync/linkedin/.env nicht gefunden — workflow_runs faellt aus"
fi

PROFILE_DIR="/home/exasync/profiles/$ACCOUNT"
rm -f "$PROFILE_DIR/Singleton"* 2>/dev/null || true

DISPLAY_NUM=$((90 + $(echo -n "$ACCOUNT" | od -An -tu1 | tr -s ' ' '+' | sed 's/^+//' | bc) % 9))
if ! pgrep -f "Xvfb :$DISPLAY_NUM " >/dev/null; then
  logmsg INFO "Starte Xvfb auf :$DISPLAY_NUM"
  Xvfb ":$DISPLAY_NUM" -screen 0 1280x900x24 -ac >/dev/null 2>&1 &
  sleep 2
fi

logmsg INFO "Run startet: account=$ACCOUNT max=$MAX_CONNECTS display=:$DISPLAY_NUM"
cd /home/exasync/linkedin
export DISPLAY=":$DISPLAY_NUM"
export LINKEDIN_PROFILE_DIR="$PROFILE_DIR"
export LINKEDIN_ACCOUNT="$ACCOUNT"
export MAX_CONNECTS="$MAX_CONNECTS"
export HEADLESS=false

node connect.mjs >> "$LOG" 2>&1
EXIT=$?
logmsg INFO "Run fertig: exit=$EXIT — Log: $LOG"
exit $EXIT

linkedin/start-chrome.name: LinkedIn Chrome-Launcher (manueller Login)
linkedin/start-chrome.description: Per-Account Chrome-Launcher mit xrdp-safe Flags + CDP-Port. Wird manuell aufgerufen damit User initial einloggt + 2FA durchklickt. Cookie wird im persistenten Profil gespeichert. Template — eine Datei pro Account: start-chrome-{account}.sh. Aktuell auf VM: start-chrome-bodo.sh (Port 9301) + start-chrome-michael.sh (Port 9302).

maut/enrich-driver.name: Anreicherung Tour + Fahrer
maut/enrich-driver.description: Joint Maut-XLSX mit fleetboard_arrivals (Tour) + Fleetboard Driver-Snapshot (vehicle_id -> DriverNameID -> Klarname). Soft-fail bei fehlendem Cache.

gate.note: G3 (Testdaten-Snapshot) entfaellt — verwendet Live-Cache aus enrich/ Ordner.

maut/enrich-driver.code:
"""Step 05b: Anreicherung der Maut-XLSX mit Tour + Fahrer.

Joint pro Maut-Zeile (Kennzeichen + Endzeit) mit:
  - Supabase fleetboard_arrivals (Tour-Daten im Maut-Zeitraum +/- 1 Tag)
  - plate_vehicle_map.json (Kennzeichen -> vehicle_id)
  - _snapshot_vid_to_driver.json (vehicle_id -> DriverNameID, AKTUELL)
  - driver_lookup.json (DriverNameID -> Klarname)

Schreibt eine angereicherte Kopie der XLSX (5 zusaetzliche Spalten:
Tour_Nr, Auftraggeber, Tour_Beladung, Tour_Ende, Fahrer) und updated
state.data.xlsx_path. Modul 07_send_report verschickt dann die
angereicherte Variante.

Soft-fail: Bei fehlenden Cache-Dateien oder Supabase-Fehlern wird das
Modul mit Status warn beendet, xlsx_path bleibt original, Pipeline
laeuft weiter und 07 verschickt die unangereicherte XLSX.

Cache-Dateien-Pfad: <ROOT>/enrich/
  - plate_vehicle_map.json     (Plate -> vehicle_id, aus fleetboard_traces)
  - driver_lookup.json         ({drivers: {DriverNameID: "Vorname Nachname"}})
  - _snapshot_vid_to_driver.json  ({vehicles: {vehicle_id: {did, ts}}})
"""
import argparse
import json
import re
import shutil
import sys
import urllib.parse
import urllib.request
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent))
from lib.common import read_state, write_state, init_logging  # noqa: E402

SUPABASE_URL = "https://crslpxgwxjmovrhyxiim.supabase.co"
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = (
    "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9."
    "eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImNyc2xweGd3eGptb3ZyaHl4aWltIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzAzMjAyNTQsImV4cCI6MjA4NTg5NjI1NH0."
    "qXPC6jR3b62DDTUIZYNHFETyJk5JkvpzuBYJLk-E1iU"
)
ENRICH_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "enrich"

# Tour-Match-Fenster: Maut-Zeitpunkt MUSS in [Beladung-1h, Tour-Ende+18h] liegen
BUFFER_HOURS_BEFORE = 1
BUFFER_HOURS_AFTER = 18


def sb_get(table, params, timeout=30):
    url = f"{SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/{table}?{urllib.parse.urlencode(params)}"
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={
        "apikey": SUPABASE_ANON_KEY,
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {SUPABASE_ANON_KEY}",
    })
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout) as resp:
        return json.loads(resp.read())


def normalize_plate(p):
    if not p:
        return ""
    return re.sub(r"[\s\-]+", "", str(p)).upper()


def parse_buchungsdatum(s):
    if not s:
        return None
    s = str(s).strip()
    for fmt in ("%d.%m.%Y", "%Y-%m-%d"):
        try:
            return datetime.strptime(s, fmt).date()
        except ValueError:
            continue
    return None


def parse_iso(s):
    if not s:
        return None
    s = str(s).strip().replace("Z", "+00:00")
    try:
        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(s)
        if dt.tzinfo is not None:
            dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=None)
        return dt
    except ValueError:
        return None


def parse_maut_zeitpunkt(bdate, endzeit):
    if not bdate:
        return None
    s = str(endzeit or "").strip()
    for fmt in ("%H:%M", "%H:%M:%S"):
        try:
            t = datetime.strptime(s, fmt).time()
            return datetime.combine(bdate, t)
        except ValueError:
            continue
    return datetime.combine(bdate, datetime.min.time().replace(hour=12))


def load_arrivals(log, date_min, date_max):
    log.info(f"Lade fleetboard_arrivals fuer {date_min} .. {date_max}")
    rows = sb_get("fleetboard_arrivals", {
        "select": "kennzeichen,tourdatum_date,tour_nr,tour_bez,auftraggeber_name,beladung,soll_ankunft,ist_ankunft",
        "and": f"(tourdatum_date.gte.{date_min},tourdatum_date.lte.{date_max})",
        "limit": "5000",
    })
    log.info(f"  -> {len(rows)} Tour-Stops")
    m = {}
    for r in rows:
        key = (r["kennzeichen"], r["tourdatum_date"])
        m.setdefault(key, []).append(r)
    return m


def load_cache_files(log):
    """Liefert (plate_to_vid, vid_to_did, driver_lookup) oder (None, None, None)
    falls Cache unvollstaendig."""
    plate_path = ENRICH_DIR / "plate_vehicle_map.json"
    snap_path = ENRICH_DIR / "_snapshot_vid_to_driver.json"
    lookup_path = ENRICH_DIR / "driver_lookup.json"

    missing = [p.name for p in (plate_path, snap_path, lookup_path) if not p.exists()]
    if missing:
        log.warning(f"Cache unvollstaendig, fehlt: {missing} unter {ENRICH_DIR}")
        return None, None, None

    plate_data = json.loads(plate_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    plate_to_vid = {k: v for k, v in plate_data.items() if not k.startswith("_")}
    log.info(f"plate->vehicle_id Mappings: {len(plate_to_vid)}")

    snap_data = json.loads(snap_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    vid_to_did = snap_data.get("vehicles", {})
    snap_age = ""
    gen = snap_data.get("_generated")
    if gen:
        try:
            gen_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(gen.replace("Z", "+00:00")).replace(tzinfo=None)
            age_h = round((datetime.utcnow() - gen_dt).total_seconds() / 3600, 1)
            snap_age = f", {age_h}h alt"
        except Exception:
            pass
    log.info(f"vehicle_id->DriverNameID: {len(vid_to_did)} Mappings{snap_age}")

    lookup_data = json.loads(lookup_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    driver_lookup = lookup_data.get("drivers", {})
    log.info(f"DriverNameID->Klarname: {len(driver_lookup)} Eintraege")

    return plate_to_vid, vid_to_did, driver_lookup


def enrich_xlsx(log, src_xlsx):
    """Erzeugt _mit_fahrer.xlsx neben src_xlsx und gibt (Pfad, stats) zurueck.
    Bei fehlendem Cache: gibt (None, stats) zurueck."""
    import openpyxl
    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

    plate_to_vid, vid_to_did, driver_lookup = load_cache_files(log)
    if plate_to_vid is None:
        return None, {"reason": "cache_missing"}

    src = Path(src_xlsx)
    if not src.exists():
        log.error(f"Input-XLSX fehlt: {src}")
        return None, {"reason": "xlsx_missing"}

    out = src.parent / f"{src.stem}_mit_fahrer{src.suffix}"
    n = 2
    while True:
        try:
            shutil.copy2(src, out)
            break
        except PermissionError:
            out = src.parent / f"{src.stem}_mit_fahrer_v{n}{src.suffix}"
            n += 1
            if n > 20:
                raise
    log.info(f"Anreicherungs-Kopie: {out}")

    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(out)
    ws = wb.active
    headers = {cell.value: cell.column for cell in ws[1] if cell.value}
    plate_col = headers.get("KFZ-Kennzeichen")
    bdate_col = headers.get("Buchungsdatum")
    if not plate_col or not bdate_col:
        log.error(f"Pflichtspalten fehlen. Header: {list(headers.keys())}")
        out.unlink(missing_ok=True)
        return None, {"reason": "header_missing"}

    dates = set()
    for r in range(2, ws.max_row + 1):
        d = parse_buchungsdatum(ws.cell(row=r, column=bdate_col).value)
        if d:
            dates.add(d)
    if not dates:
        log.warning("Keine parsbaren Buchungsdaten — keine Anreicherung moeglich")
        out.unlink(missing_ok=True)
        return None, {"reason": "no_dates"}

    date_min = (min(dates) - timedelta(days=2)).isoformat()
    date_max = (max(dates) + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    log.info(
        f"Maut-Zeitraum: {min(dates)} .. {max(dates)} "
        f"(Tour-Lookup-Fenster: {date_min} .. {date_max})"
    )

    try:
        arrivals = load_arrivals(log, date_min, date_max)
    except Exception as e:
        log.error(f"Supabase-Abfrage fehlgeschlagen: {e}")
        out.unlink(missing_ok=True)
        return None, {"reason": "supabase_failed", "error": str(e)}

    new_cols = {
        "Tour_Nr": ws.max_column + 1,
        "Auftraggeber": ws.max_column + 2,
        "Tour_Beladung": ws.max_column + 3,
        "Tour_Ende": ws.max_column + 4,
        "Fahrer": ws.max_column + 5,
    }
    for name, col in new_cols.items():
        c = ws.cell(row=1, column=col, value=name)
        c.font = Font(bold=True)
        c.fill = PatternFill(start_color="FFE699", end_color="FFE699", fill_type="solid")

    stats = {
        "rows_total": 0,
        "tour_matched": 0,
        "tour_missing": 0,
        "driver_matched": 0,
        "driver_missing": 0,
        "vehicle_missing": 0,
    }

    for r in range(2, ws.max_row + 1):
        stats["rows_total"] += 1
        plate_raw = ws.cell(row=r, column=plate_col).value
        bdate = parse_buchungsdatum(ws.cell(row=r, column=bdate_col).value)
        endzeit = ws.cell(row=r, column=2).value  # 'Endzeit oder Nutzungszeit'
        plate = normalize_plate(plate_raw)
        maut_dt = parse_maut_zeitpunkt(bdate, endzeit)

        tour_nr = ""
        auftraggeber = ""
        tour_beladung = ""
        tour_ende = ""
        tour_matched = False
        if plate and bdate and maut_dt:
            candidates = []
            for delta in (0, -1, -2):
                key = (plate, (bdate + timedelta(days=delta)).isoformat())
                if key in arrivals:
                    candidates.extend(arrivals[key])
            matching = {}
            for h in candidates:
                bel = parse_iso(h.get("beladung"))
                end = parse_iso(h.get("ist_ankunft")) or parse_iso(h.get("soll_ankunft"))
                if not bel:
                    continue
                window_start = bel - timedelta(hours=BUFFER_HOURS_BEFORE)
                window_end = (end or bel + timedelta(hours=24)) + timedelta(hours=BUFFER_HOURS_AFTER)
                if window_start <= maut_dt <= window_end:
                    matching.setdefault(h.get("tour_nr") or "", []).append(h)

            if matching:
                tour_nrs = sorted(t for t in matching if t)
                tour_nr = ", ".join(tour_nrs)[:200]
                stops = [s for v in matching.values() for s in v]
                ags = sorted({s.get("auftraggeber_name") or "" for s in stops if s.get("auftraggeber_name")})
                auftraggeber = ", ".join(ags)[:200]
                belas = [parse_iso(s.get("beladung")) for s in stops if s.get("beladung")]
                belas = [b for b in belas if b]
                if belas:
                    tour_beladung = min(belas).strftime("%d.%m.%Y %H:%M")
                istan = [parse_iso(s.get("ist_ankunft")) for s in stops if s.get("ist_ankunft")]
                istan = [i for i in istan if i]
                sollan = [parse_iso(s.get("soll_ankunft")) for s in stops if s.get("soll_ankunft")]
                sollan = [s for s in sollan if s]
                if istan:
                    tour_ende = max(istan).strftime("%d.%m.%Y %H:%M")
                elif sollan:
                    tour_ende = max(sollan).strftime("%d.%m.%Y %H:%M") + " (Soll)"
                tour_matched = True
                stats["tour_matched"] += 1
            else:
                stats["tour_missing"] += 1

        ws.cell(row=r, column=new_cols["Tour_Nr"], value=tour_nr)
        ws.cell(row=r, column=new_cols["Auftraggeber"], value=auftraggeber)
        ws.cell(row=r, column=new_cols["Tour_Beladung"], value=tour_beladung)
        ws.cell(row=r, column=new_cols["Tour_Ende"], value=tour_ende)

        fahrer = ""
        if tour_matched:
            vid = plate_to_vid.get(plate)
            if not vid:
                stats["vehicle_missing"] += 1
            else:
                entry = vid_to_did.get(vid)
                if entry:
                    did = entry.get("did") if isinstance(entry, dict) else entry
                    klarname = driver_lookup.get(did) or f"DriverNameID {did}"
                    klarname = klarname.replace(" (inaktiv)", "").strip()
                    fahrer = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", klarname)
                    stats["driver_matched"] += 1
                else:
                    stats["driver_missing"] += 1
        ws.cell(row=r, column=new_cols["Fahrer"], value=fahrer)

    wb.save(out)
    log.info(
        f"Anreicherung fertig: {stats['tour_matched']}/{stats['rows_total']} Tour-Match, "
        f"{stats['driver_matched']} mit Fahrer, "
        f"{stats['driver_missing']} ohne Snapshot, {stats['vehicle_missing']} ohne Vehicle"
    )
    return str(out), stats


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--state", required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    log = init_logging("05b_enrich_driver")
    state_path = Path(args.state)
    state = read_state(state_path)

    src_xlsx = state.get("data", {}).get("xlsx_path")
    if not src_xlsx:
        log.warning("Kein xlsx_path in state.data — Anreicherung uebersprungen")
        state["step_status"]["05b_enrich_driver"] = "warn"
        state["data"]["enriched"] = False
        write_state(state_path, state)
        sys.exit(0)

    try:
        out_xlsx, stats = enrich_xlsx(log, src_xlsx)
    except Exception as e:
        log.error(f"enrich_driver crashed: {e}")
        state["step_status"]["05b_enrich_driver"] = "error"
        state["errors"]["05b_enrich_driver"] = str(e)
        state["data"]["enriched"] = False
        write_state(state_path, state)
        sys.exit(1)

    if out_xlsx is None:
        log.warning(f"Anreicherung nicht moeglich: {stats}")
        state["step_status"]["05b_enrich_driver"] = "warn"
        state["data"]["enriched"] = False
        state["data"]["enrich_skip_reason"] = stats.get("reason")
        write_state(state_path, state)
        sys.exit(0)

    state["step_status"]["05b_enrich_driver"] = "ok"
    state["data"]["enriched"] = True
    state["data"]["xlsx_path_original"] = src_xlsx
    state["data"]["xlsx_path"] = out_xlsx
    state["data"]["enrich_stats"] = stats
    write_state(state_path, state)
    sys.exit(0)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
